title: Creative Strategist
description:
We are a fast growing DTC ecommerce brand scaling aggressively through paid ads and building toward becoming a 9-figure brand.



To get there, we are looking for a high level Creative Strategist who can turn customer psychology into winning ad creatives.



This role is not about making “nice looking ads”.



It is about deeply understanding customers, developing powerful ad angles, writing high-performing scripts and continuously improving creatives based on performance data.



You will work directly with the founder and creative team to build a high output creative testing engine designed to consistently produce winning ads and scale the brand to the next level.



Creative is the single biggest growth lever in paid acquisition and the person in this role will play a critical part in developing the messaging and creative strategy that drives the brand toward 9-figure scale.



Responsibilities:



Customer & Market Research



Analyse customer reviews, comments and feedback

Identify key pain points, desires, objections and motivations

Develop clear customer avatars



Creative Strategy



Translate research insights into strong ad angles

Identify messaging opportunities competitors are missing

Develop structured creative testing plans



Script Development



Write high-converting UGC ad scripts

Develop hooks that stop the scroll

Brief creators and editors on execution



Creative Iteration



Analyse ad performance data

Identify why creatives win or lose

Improve scripts and angles based on learnings



Your work will directly impact revenue and ad scalability.



What Makes Someone Great In This Role



You think like a direct response marketer, not just a creative.

You know how to turn customer psychology into messaging that converts.

You enjoy analysing why ads work and improving them based on performance data.

You are comfortable generating many creative concepts each week and refining them through testing.



Ideal Experience



You have experience working with DTC ecommerce brands and understand how creative drives paid ad performance.



You should have a strong understanding of:



Customer awareness stages

Core customer desires and emotional drivers

Developing clear and actionable customer avatars

Direct response copywriting techniques

Structured creative testing and iteration



You understand how to translate:



Customer research ? customer avatar ? ad angle ? script ? creative test



Strong candidates will also be comfortable analysing ad performance and extracting insights to improve future creatives.



What You’ll Get



We are building a serious performance marketing team.



You will get:



Autonomy to develop creative strategy

Fast creative testing cycles

Direct collaboration with the founder

Clear performance impact



Compensation includes a monthly retainer plus performance bonuses tied to creative success



We are not looking for someone who simply writes scripts.



We are looking for someone who can think strategically about creative performance and consistently develop winning ad concepts.



If that sounds like you, we would love to hear from you.

title: Lead Qualifier Cold Caller
description:
About This Role

We are a U.S.-based freight brokerage looking for a sharp, confident phone rep to make outbound calls and qualify shipping leads. This is a simple, repetitive job — you say the same 5–7 sentences on every call. That's it. No selling. No explaining. Just qualify and hand off.



If you can speak flawlessly clear English, stay focused, and hit your daily call targets, this role is steady, long-term work.



NO accent of any kind. Crystal clear American-neutral English is a hard requirement. If your English is anything less than 100% clear, please do not apply.

What You'll Do

You will call businesses in the U.S. and ask to speak with their shipping or logistics department. Once connected, you read a short script — the same script every time — and log qualified leads for our sales team to follow up.



That's the whole job. Simple, focused, and trackable.



Your Script — You Say This On Every Call

Getting to the right person

"Hi, shipping please."  —OR—  "Hi, I need to check on a truck status — can you transfer me to shipping?"

Your opener

"Hi, this is YOUR NAME with ABC LOGISTICS — really quick, do you work with freight brokers? We truly have the best freight rates and experience."

If they say yes

"Oh fantastic — what is your name?"

Close & hand off

"[Name], thank you so much for your time. Our team will call you back to quote you rates. Have a great day!"

You will use one name (e.g., "Michael or Melissa") and follow this exact script on every call. No improvising.

Requirements

100?cent-free, crystal clear spoken English — non-negotiable

Stable high-speed internet connection 

Quiet, professional work environment — no background noise

Available to work U.S. business hours (Eastern or Central time)

Full-time availability — this is not a part-time position

Reliable computer/headset setup

Strong work ethic — you must be comfortable making high call volume daily

Ability to follow a script exactly without going off-script

What to Expect

All calls are recorded and tracked for time, quality, and script adherence

You will be evaluated on call volume, clarity, and lead quality

Performance reviews are regular — this is a results-driven role

Consistent performers are rewarded with long-term stable work

This is a legitimate, long-term opportunity for someone who is disciplined, professional, and proud of their English communication skills.

Compensation

Competitive pay PLUS lead bonus monthly commission commensurate with experience. Details discussed after your voice recording is reviewed and you are shortlisted. Please send us voice recording of the script to be qualified.

title: GoHighLevel Automation & CRM Systems Builder (Virtual Assistant)
description:

These systems typically include:

 follow-up systems

?

?



Compensation

?



Responsibilities

 follow-up sequences

?

Required skills include:



• Experience building workflows in GoHighLevel

• Understanding of CRM pipelines and lead stages

• Experience with triggers, tags, and automation logic

• Ability to connect forms, calendars, and workflows

• Ability to troubleshoot automation issues

• Ability to follow technical instructions and SOPs

• Strong attention to detail



?



Bonus Skills (Not Required)



These are helpful but not required:



• AI chatbot implementation

• Zapier or Make automation

• Webhook integrations

• Basic funnel or landing page building

•
 deliverability setup



?



Tools Used

• GoHighLevel

• Google Workspace

• Slack

• Loom



?



Application Questions

?



Skill Verification Task

A service business needs:



• A lead capture form

• Leads automatically added to a CRM pipeline

• An automated
 follow-up sequence

• A booking calendar sent to the lead

• The pipeline stage updated when an appointment is booked



Provide a short step-by-step explanation of how you would build this system.



?



How to Apply



To apply for this role:

 1. Submit your work experience

 2. Answer the application questions

 3. Complete the skill verification task



At the beginning of your application, write the phrase:



HighLevel Builder



This helps us confirm that you read the full job listing.



Applications that do not include this phrase will not be reviewed.



?



Important



We are looking for someone who has real experience building automations inside GoHighLevel.



If your experience is mainly page building or design, this role will not be a good fit.



This is a technical systems role focused on CRM automation and backend infrastructure.

title: Graphic Designer (Photoshop Expert) for an Amazon Company
description:
About the Role:

Full-Time 40hours/week | $600/month | 8:30 am - 4:30 pm EST 



We are an e-commerce company focused on high-volume print-on-demand orders from platforms like Amazon, Shopify, and Etsy. 

We’re looking for fast, reliable, and detail-oriented graphic designers who can handle daily production tasks, create print-ready files, and use AI tools to speed up design workflows. This is a production-focused role, not a purely creative position. The job involves preparing customer orders, fixing files, and producing designs quickly and accurately.



Key Responsibilities:

title: Virtual Assistant – Executive Support
description:
About the Role

We are a busy medical practice seeking a highly intelligent and self-directed Virtual Assistant to support our physician executive. This is not a task-entry role -  we need someone who takes full ownership of problems, finds solutions independently, and delivers results fast + knowledge with malpractice insurance

If you are resourceful, proactive, and thrive without hand-holding, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities



Research & Problem Solving

• Research vendors, service providers, and companies on behalf of the physician (e.g., malpractice insurance carriers, AI/technology tools, documentation solutions)

• Compare pricing, terms, and options - then present clear, organized findings

• Follow up on social media or video content referencing tools or companies of interest and gather full details



Administrative & Calendar Support

• Manage and organize the physician's calendar and schedule

• Handle
 inbox tasks including locating, organizing, and routing information to the appropriate tea
mbers

Medical & Insurance Coordination

• Access the physician's
 to identify and compile a list of medical insurance companies that have made prior contact

• Deliver insurance contact information to the medical billing team

• Coordinate with insurance companies on behalf of the billing team as needed



Internal Task Management & Oversight

• Follow up with internal tea
mbers to ensure delegated tasks are completed on time

• Escalate or resolve bottlenecks proactively without waiting to be asked

• Monitor ongoing projects (e.g., process documentation work) and report on progress



Technology & AI Research

• Track emerging AI tools and software relevant to the practice's operations

• Research specific tools or platforms identified by the physician and deliver actionable summaries

• Connect research findings with the right internal tea
mbers to move projects forward



What We're Looking For

• Exceptional problem-solving ability — you find a way, not an excuse

• Fast turnaround: tasks that should take 3 days should not take 3 months

• Strong organizational skills and the ability to juggle multiple priorities

• Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

• Confident communicator who asks smart, targeted questions — not someone who passes problems back

• Experience with
 management, research, and coordinating across teams

• Familiarity with medical or healthcare administration is a plus, but not required

• English fluency is helpful but not required — intelligence and execution matter most



What This Role Is NOT

• This is not a data-entry or scheduling-only role

• You will not be micromanaged — but you will be held to a high standard

• We do not accept 'I couldn't figure it out' as an answer — we expect you to find a way or ask a smart question



How to Apply:

Change the Subject Line to: "I am a problem solver– [Your Name] "

Send your resume and any relevant portfolio samples to:

d a t . v a 1 1 4 8 at g`m`a`i`l . c o m (remove spaces)



We look forward to reviewing your application and exploring how your skills can contribute to our team!



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Marketing Coordinator
description:
Location: Remote

Rate: $3–6/hour (DOE)

Timezone Requirement: Must be available during CST business hours

Type: Part-Time (10–25 hrs/week) with opportunity to move to Full-Time

Reports To: Marketing Manager



Are you a detail-driven marketing operator who thrives on structure, systems, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks? Token of Trust is looking for a Marketing Coordinator to help power the day-to-day execution of our Growth team and keep our marketing engine running smoothly.



HELLO!



Hey, I’m Austin, and I lead Growth at Token of Trust. We’re not a startup — we’ve been around for over a decade, building trust and identity solutions for ecommerce businesses, and many of our remote tea
mbers have grown with us over the years. We’re looking for a Marketing Coordinator to support the day-to-day operations of our Growth team. This role is perfect for someone who thrives on structure, organization, and execution. You’ll keep content calendars full, tasks tracked, and cross-functional projects moving — strategy is set, your job is to make it deliverable.



Our team operates on a hybrid Customer-Led Growth (CLG) and Product-Led Growth (PLG) model, which demands tight coordination, clean systems, and disciplined execution. If you love organized boards, smooth workflows, and seeing projects go from “idea” to “published” without chaos — you’ll fit right in.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



CONTENT CALENDAR MANAGEMENT

- Own and maintain our marketing content calendar across blog and social (LinkedIn,
)

- Ensure content is always scheduled at least 1–2 weeks in advance to avoid gaps

- Coordinate timelines with writers, designers, and the Head of Marketing to keep deliverables on track

- QA and upload blog content into CMS (WordPress), format for readability, and ensure all links/UTMs/CTAs are correct

- Schedule and publish social posts via Meta Business Suite or similar tools

- Design blog graphics, social media visuals, and lightweight reels or video snippets for posts



Task & Project Coordination

- Create and manage Trello cards for all marketing tasks — no important item should go undocumented

- Ensure every task card includes: Acceptance Criteria, Release Notes, and Risk Checklist (if applicable) before it moves to “In Progress”

- Track weekly priorities, manage the sprint board, and surface blockers when needed

- Maintain visibility into both committed work and in-progress items to help the tea
et deadlines



Cross-Functional Support

- Intake requests from other departments via the Growth team’s Trello inbox and ensure timely follow-up

- Support cross-functional execution —
 sends, campaign QA, partner collateral updates, etc.

- Assist with formatting and publishing marketing materials, blog posts, and newsletters



Ops & Reporting

- Support weekly reporting on marketing metrics, completed activities, and process improvements

- Help enforce consistency around folder organization, UTMs, naming conventions, and metadata tracking



What You Bring:

- 1–3 years of experience in marketing coordination, project management,  editorial operations, or content marketing

- Highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented — you love clarity, checklists, and closing the loop

- Comfortable managing and enforcing process in Trello (or similar task management tools)

- Confident using WordPress, social schedulers (e.g., Buffer, Later, Meta Suite), and Google Workspace

- Intermediate SEO knowledge — including keyword research, on-page optimization, internal linking, metadata, and basic content performance analysis

- Clear written communication and professional follow-through

- Design experience using Canva, Figma, or similar tools to create marketing visuals and short-form content

- Familiarity with B2B SaaS marketing and content performance reporting is a plus



WHY YOU SHOULD APPLY

- Flexible schedule with required attendance at key meetings in Central Time and at least 2 hours of CST overlap daily

- Opportunity to grow into full-time with incentives and bonuses

- Access to professional marketing tools

- Long-term stability

- Real ownership of operational marketing execution



HOW TO APPLY

We’re looking for more than just a resume show us your skills! Drop us a message or send your resume highlighting your relevant background.



To apply:

1) Put the word “trust” in your subject line.

Applications without this word in the subject line will not be reviewed. 



2) In the first line of your message, list the 3 most important requirements you noticed in this job post.



3) Then answer the questions below in your application message:

Why are you a strong fit for this role?

In 150–200 words, explain why you are a good fit for this position. Reference 2 specific responsibilities from this job post and tell us which tools or workflows you’ve used that are most similar.



Content Project Example

Describe one specific blog post or content project you personally coordinated from start to publish. Please include:

- Company or brand name

- CMS used

- Who else was involved

- 3 specific steps you handled yourself

- Any SEO steps you implemented

- 1 issue, delay, or problem you had to solve

- Measurable outcomes

- A live link to the published piece



Social Post Example

Provide one real example of a social post you personally scheduled. Please include:

- Platform

- Exact caption

- Goal of the post

- Why you chose that timing

- Results achieved

- A live link or screenshot of the post



If your experience seems like a strong match, we’ll be in touch to discuss next steps.



If you’re passionate about technology, enjoy tackling new challenges, and want to make a real impact, we’d love to hear from you. Let’s build something incredible together!

title: Web Builder and Automation Specialist
description:
Role Summary

You build and maintain websites, landing pages, funnels, and basic automations for multiple brands. Your core tools are GoHighLevel and WordPress. You also set up and troubleshoot integrations using 
, Zapier, and related tools.

You work fast, keep builds tidy, document what you do, and communicate clearly.



Work Arrangement

•Remote, Philippines only

•Paid hourly or on a weekly retainer, based on experience and capability



Key Responsibilities

GoHighLevel

•Build landing pages, funnels, forms, surveys, calendars, and basic membership pages

•Set up domains, DNS records, and SSL where required

•Apply mobile responsive design and consistent styling

•Create and maintain reusable page templates and section blocks

•Troubleshoot page, form, tracking, and publishing issues

WordPress

•Build and maintain WordPress sites using modern page builders and themes

•Implement basic on-page SEO and performance improvements

•Install, configure, and maintain plugins with a security-first approach

•Troubleshoot site issues including layout breaks, caching, and plugin conflicts

•Manage backups, updates, and staging where required

Automations and Integrations

•Build workflows in GoHighLevel including triggers, campaigns, pipelines, tasks, and notifications

•Create integrations using 
 and Zapier

•Connect forms, calendars, payment links, CRM fields, Google Sheets, Slack,
 providers, and webhooks

•Debug automation failures using logs, test data, and structured checks

•Document automations so they're easy to maintain and hand over

Quality and Delivery

•Work from briefs and checklists, then fill gaps without being chased

•Maintain clean naming conventions and folder structure

•Provide handover notes, short Loom videos, or step-by-step documentation

•Track time and tasks accurately

•Flag risks early and propose practical fixes



Skills and Experience

Must Have

•Strong GoHighLevel experience with pages and core CRM features

•Strong WordPress experience building and maintaining client sites

•Comfortable with 
 or Zapier, including multi-step scenarios

•Solid understanding of domains, DNS, SSL, and basic hosting concepts

•Good design judgement and attention to detail

•Clear written English and reliable communication

•Able to work independently and hit deadlines

Nice to Have

•Basic HTML and CSS for quick fixes and styling control

•Experience with tracking and analytics: GA4, Meta Pixel, UTM structure

??
 deliverability basics: SPF, DKIM, DMARC

•Experience building SOPs or internal documentation



Tools You'll Use

GoHighLevel, WordPress, 
, Zapier, Google Workspace, Loom or similar screen recording tool, and a project management tool such as Airtable, ClickUp, Trello, or Asana.



What Good Looks Like

•Pages and sites launched on time with minimal revisions

•Automations run reliably with clear logs and documentation

•Reduced rework through consistent naming, structure, and templates

•Fast turnaround on fixes and improvements

•Clean handovers so others can maintain the work



What to Include in Your Application

•A short summary of your GoHighLevel experience and what you build most

•A short summary of your automation experience, including 
 or Zapier examples

•Your weekly availability and usual working hours

•Your internet speed and backup connection details



Contract Notes

This is a contractor role. You manage your own taxes and government contributions. You supply your own equipment and a stable internet connection. Work is assigned and paid based on agreed scope and tracked hours.

description:

You will be responsible for setting up and maintaining our digital marketing tech stack, ensuring platforms are properly connected and optimized, and managing the day-to-day backend of our content systems — with a special focus on Agorapulse for social scheduling, publishing, and performance monitoring.

title: Virtual Assistant Project Manager – Residential Construction / Fix & Flip
description:
We are a well-established residential fix-and-flip company based in the Chicagoland area with over 15 years in business. We renovate and resell 30+ homes per year and are looking to hire a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant Project Manager to help support our construction and renovation operations remotely.



This role is ideal for someone with strong English communication skills, excellent administrative and project management ability, and a working knowledge of residential construction materials, repairs, and renovation processes. The right candidate should have enough construction familiarity to understand scopes of work, materials, vendor coordination, and contractor follow-up, while also being eager to continue learning and improving.



Key Responsibilities:



Prepare and draft construction agreements and scopes of work based on:



interior and exterior property photos



virtual tours



property measurements



repair notes and provided templates



Create detailed material lists for repairs using:



company material list documents



property measurements



project scopes and renovation standards



Coordinate and place orders with vendors and suppliers, including:



roofing companies



cabinet companies



other construction material vendors as needed



Follow up with contractors daily or weekly to:



track progress



confirm completed work



identify delays or issues



help keep projects on schedule



Coordinate permits and communicate with village/building departments regarding:



permit applications



inspection scheduling



status updates



required documents



Update spreadsheet trackers for:



receipts



material purchases



project costs



vendor and contractor payment support



Review and help approve contractor Home Depot and other material purchases on a daily basis



Maintain organized project records, notes, and communication logs



Qualifications:



Strong spoken and written English



Previous experience as a virtual assistant, project coordinator, construction coordinator, or project manager



Basic to intermediate knowledge of residential construction, remodeling, building materials, and common repair items



Strong attention to detail and ability to interpret photos, walkthroughs, and scopes of work



Comfortable working with spreadsheets, trackers, vendor quotes, and purchase records



Strong follow-up and communication skills with contractors, suppliers, and municipalities



Ability to manage multiple projects at once and stay organized in a fast-paced environment



Reliable internet connection and availability during U.S. business hours, especially Central Time



Preferred Qualifications:



Experience in residential rehabs, fix-and-flip, property management, or construction administration



Familiarity with permits, inspections, cabinets, roofing, paint, flooring, drywall, plumbing, electrical, and general renovation materials



Experience using Google Sheets, Excel, CompanyCam, contractor communication platforms, or project tracking tools



What We’re Looking For:



We are looking for someone proactive, sharp, resourceful, and comfortable taking ownership of project coordination tasks. This is not just a general admin role. The right person will play an important role in helping us keep renovations moving, control material ordering, improve contractor accountability, and maintain organized records across multiple projects.



You should be comfortable learning our systems and standards, asking smart questions, and becoming a long-term part of our team.



About Us:



We are a Chicagoland-based fix-and-flip company that has been in business for 15 years and completes over 30 homes per year. We value speed, accuracy, accountability, and strong communication.



Here’s a shorter version for a job post headline/summary too:



Virtual Assistant Project Manager for Chicagoland Fix & Flip Company

Seeking an experienced remote VA/project manager with strong English skills and construction knowledge to help manage residential renovation projects. Duties include writing scopes of work, creating material lists, placing orders with vendors, following up with contractors, coordinating permits, updating spreadsheets, and helping approve daily material purchases. Must be organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-paced fix-and-flip environment.

title: Freight Forwarding Operations & Process Specialist (Remote | Full-time)
description:
Hours: 40 hrs/week | Rate: USD 4–6/hr | Start: ASAP | Location: Remote | Contract: Long-term

Pay: Weekly | Trial: 2-week paid trial (performance-based continuation + possible immediate rate increase)



ABOUT VLYOU

VLYOU builds and runs SOP-driven operations for clients. Our core is process excellence: clear standards, checklists, quality control, and continuous improvement. We are not just executing their processes, we are defining them and improving their service delivery by doing so. We are small (one person in The Netherlands and three in the Philipines), but have great ambitions to grow our business and we need you to do that.



Your primary assignment will be supporting our client CargoCare NL (freight forwarding). Over time you may also support other clients (including our own E-commerce website 
) when priorities shift.



ROLE SUMMARY

We’re hiring a Freight Forwarding Operations & Process Specialist who can execute freight forwarding work with high quality and also think in processes and process improvement.

You will start by executing existing SOPs (so you can contribute fast), and gradually expand into documenting/improving SOPs together with the team and the client.



WHAT YOU’LL DO (EXECUTION FIRST, THEN IMPROVEMENT)

Execution (primary in the beginning)

• Run day-to-day freight forwarding tasks using existing SOPs and checklists.

• Create / maintain shipment files in Scope (Riege) and keep data clean and up to date.

• Monitor carrier updates and schedule changes (ETD/ETA changes, amendments) and process them correctly.

• Submit / verify shipping milestones and key portal actions (e.g., VGM / Shipping Instructions in carrier portals when required).

• Coordinate documents and stakeholders: booking confirmations/amendments, pre-alerts, transport documents (HBL/MBL/CMR), handovers, and follow-ups for missing information.

• Provide proactive, consolidated status updates to avoid surprises.



Quality & escalation (always)

• Work with high standards: accuracy, completeness, and clear documentation.

• Use checklists, QA steps, and “four-eyes” principles where required.

• Follow exception & escalation standards: escalate early with educated, targeted questions (not vague open questions).



Process building (grows over time)

• Help improve existing SOPs and create new SOPs in Notion (process documentation + continuous improvement).

• Identify recurring issues/root causes and propose fixes (process, checklist, tooling, automation, training).



MUST-HAVES

• Freight forwarding experience is required (you understand the logistics world and can get productive and proactive quickly).

• Strong attention to detail and a “quality-first” mindset.

• Proactive communicator: clear updates, ownership, and initiative.

• Process mindset: you can follow SOPs precisely and also improve them.

• Comfortable using AI to work faster and better (drafting, checking, summarizing, creating checklists/SOPs).

• Stable internet + your own computer.



NICE-TO-HAVES

• Experience with Scope (Riege) or similar forwarding systems (pré, not required).

• Customs coordination experience (pré), as we may expand activities with a customs office.

• Notion experience (pré).

• Experience with process optimization / SOP writing.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

• Start at $4–6/hr (weekly payments) - we pay in Euro (Euro range: €3,5 - 5). Starting payment is defined based on relevant experience.

• 2-week paid trial: if performance is above expectations, rate can be increased immediately up to 10% - so show us everything you've got! ;-).

• Twice-per-year salary review (max 20% increase per year).

• Quarterly team bonus up to one week salary per quarter (plus occasional extra bonuses).



AVAILABILITY / FOCUS

We need someone dedicated. If you currently have other obligations, that’s okay — but you must be transparent. We understand you might need some time to free yourself from other obligations. Long-term, we expect full focus on our work (no ongoing side freelance jobs). That is: we accept that you spend some time on other obligations in the first month, but expect full dedication after that. We are flexible and we believe acceptable working hours will help to promote health and stay focused, so we don't expect you to work day and night, but we do have a hard rule of not taking up any other work- or study when working for us to avoid conflicting situations.



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT – REQUIRED)

To be considered, you MUST answer the questions below in numbered format. Applications that skip questions will be rejected without explanation - we want to focus our time on candidates who are considering their application the way would like you to put attention on your work.

Also: start your application message with the word “ANCHOR”.



1) Freight forwarding background: years of experience, import/export, sea/air/road, and your typical responsibilities.

2) Describe 1 real example of an exception you handled (e.g., schedule change, missing docs, portal issue). What did you do and how did you communicate it?

3) Describe a SOP/checklist you followed or created/improved. How did you ensure quality (QA / four-eyes / error prevention)?

4) Confirm: (a) you can work ~40 hrs/week, (b) your expected hourly rate within €3.5 - 5/hr, (c) when you can start, and (d) any obligations in the next 3 months that could impact availability (job/study/family/holidays). Honesty is valued.



Looking forward to your submission.



Kind regards,



Koen van Dam

Owner VLYOU Value Creation &

title: E-Book writer
description:
Hello! I am looking for someone to help my company compose information into an E-Book. The role can be viewed as a multi-talent need. As i will need someone to search for the information to fill an outlined category within the E-book. The E-book will focus on travel to Europe. So every single nation in Europe will need to be outlined. I have already started and nearly finished several as examples to replicate. The work is being done within google docs. You will research the needed information per category within each country's subsection. Then once found, copying it, editing the original text into a newly phrased paragraph or make slight edits to the words in use or sentence. Once the information is found, and edited, it is to placed within the appropriate bullet point within a category. An example could be as such: "Find out how to convert an American driver's license into the equivalent license in Denmark". You would search through multiple websites to find the appropriate data that is comparably correct across multiple sources. Absolutely NO ai is being used in this book to ensure that the information is correct directly from multiple sources! 

Once the country's outlined information categories are finished, that nation will be completed and you would begin on the next nation. After all information has been collected and all nations are filled out with their respective sources listed within their subcategories, we will review the nations together to ensure we have not missed anything. Once one book is created and if we think we do well working together, then i hope to create more! And i hope to continue that relationship and grow together. After the books are completed i will also need assistance with admin work across Tiktok, Instagram, Youtube, and
 pages to post to boost content on said books. 

If you have made it this far please respond via
 to me with a simple answer to my question. " How long does it take to gain citizenship in Spain for a NON eu citizen". The correct answer will let me know you are serious about the position and willing to do some basic research.

title: Marketing Operations Manager | Sprint Planning | ClickUp Advanced | Agency
description:
EEMS is a Caribbean-based marketing and PR agency serving high-value clients across professional services, tourism, and compliance sectors. We run a lean team of three plus subcontractors, and we operate across a wide range of services including social media management, digital advertising,
 marketing, campaign management, brand development, events, and PR.



We are looking for an experienced marketing operations professional to own sprint planning and team coordination starting March 15, 2026.



This is a project-based contract for March with the intention of expanding to an ongoing fractional arrangement from April if it goes well.





WHAT YOU WILL OWN



- Plan and publish the weekly team sprint in ClickUp every week

- Break all projects into granular subtasks with step-by-step execution instructions

- Coordinate two direct team members (graphic designer and digital marketing specialist) plus subcontractors

- Manage mid-week reprioritization independently without CEO involvement in routine decisions

- Track sprint performance using our existing dashboard tracker

- Audit our current ClickUp structure and implement improvements

- Flag blocked items early with proposed resolutions

- Identify workflow gaps and build systems that make the team more efficient





THIS IS NOT THE RIGHT FIT IF YOU



- Need to be told what to prioritize

- Use ClickUp as a checklist tool rather than a full project management system

- Have not managed a team sprint in ClickUp before

- Need frequent check-ins or direction to stay productive

- Prefer large, structured corporate environments





WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU



- Minimum 3 years in a marketing operations, project management, or agency operations role

- Advanced ClickUp experience including sprint management, custom fields, automations, dashboards, and workflow design

- Proven ability to coordinate a team and keep projects moving toward deadlines independently

- Strong written English

- Available to overlap with Caribbean timezone (AST, 9am to 5pm) on weekdays







ENGAGEMENT DETAILS



- Start date: March 15, 2026

- Duration: 4 weeks project contract, with fractional expansion from April based on performance

- Budget: $500 USD fixed price for March

- Hours: 40 to 50 hours across the month

- Location: Remote

title: AI Image Prompt Specialist
description:
Join a fast-growing platform focusing on AI chat and entertainment experiences. The platform across multiple apps collectively has over 3 million users with more joining each day



Overview



We're looking for someone with hands-on experience generating high-quality, realistic AI images using text-to-image tools. This is a prompting-focused role, not an engineering role. You'll be creating images, videos, and characters daily for our platform, so we need someone who already knows what works and what doesn't when it comes to getting great outputs from generative AI.



What You'll Do



Write and iterate on prompts to generate realistic, high-quality images across styles and use cases

Generate AI videos and character assets for our platform

Work with tools like Nano Banana Pro, z-image, and similar image generation platforms

Develop and maintain a library of proven prompts, styles, and workflows

Collaborate with the team on creative direction and visual output standards

Stay current with new models, tools, and prompting techniques as the space evolves



What We're Looking For



Demonstrated experience prompting AI image generators (share your portfolio or examples)

Strong understanding of what makes AI-generated images look realistic vs. artificial

Familiarity with prompt structure, negative prompts, style references, seed management, and parameter tuning

An eye for detail, especially around common AI artifacts (hands, faces, lighting, anatomy)

Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal oversight



Nice to Have



Experience with advanced workflows like ComfyUI, A1111, or similar node-based/local setups

Background in AI video generation tools

Understanding of LoRAs, ControlNet, in-painting, or image-to-image techniques

Photography or digital art background that informs your prompting instincts



This role is not a software engineering position, graphic design role (though design sense helps) or a theoretical role. We need someone who has actually generated thousands of images and knows the craft.



Website

nectar.ai



Send us a message through these channels:

title: Military Veteran Scriptwriter — Outer Side Documentary Channel (Remote)
description:
Scriptwriter / Producer – Military Documentary YouTube Channel



We’re expanding our YouTube channel Outer Side and looking for a producer–scriptwriter who can turn breaking defense news and complex military technology into clear, cinematic, documentary-style scripts.



Outer Side focuses on , geography, and geopolitics, we are trying to include more military videos .



In this role, you’ll research current events using video references and OSINT sources, build clear outlines quickly, and write with an authoritative voice that remains conversational and easy for viewers to follow.



?



Responsibilities



Research & production



Collect reference material from videos and open-source sources such as official statements, news footage, briefings, and verified social media posts. Compile these into organized source packs with timestamps and notes.



Write documentary-style scripts



Create ~3,000-word scripts designed for professional narration. Scripts should use active voice, maintain an expert yet accessible tone, and stay focused without unnecessary filler.



Simplify complex military systems



Explain advanced defense systems and tactics (for example CIWS/SeaWiz, AEGIS, carrier flight operations, weapons platforms, and tactical maneuvers) in a clear and understandable way while maintaining technical accuracy.



Cover current conflicts



Turn rapidly developing military events into clear and engaging narratives. Examples include Ukraine strikes on Russian supply lines, maritime interdictions, or emerging defense developments.



Pitch and outline ideas



Propose strong angles, outlines, titles, and thumbnail concepts designed to maximize viewer engagement, retention, and click-through rate.



Prepare scripts for editors



Deliver scripts in Google Docs with visual guidance including:

 • scene or footage suggestions

 • B-roll ideas

 • map or animation cues

 • pronunciation notes for complex terminology



Script review (future responsibility)



Assist with reviewing and editing scripts written by other contributors to ensure quality, consistency, and efficiency across the team.



?



Output & Work Pace



Production target:

Approximately 5–7 scripts per week, each around 3,000 words (roughly 15,000–21,000 words weekly).



Quality expectations:

 • fully fact-checked research

 • original writing (no AI-generated final drafts)

 • strong structure and pacing

 • compelling hooks designed to maintain viewer attention



?



Required Background



Military experience is strongly preferred, especially from the Navy or Air Force.



This role benefits from practical familiarity with weapons systems, sensors, aircraft, naval platforms, or operational procedures rather than purely theoretical analysis.



You should also have:

 • Excellent communication skills and the ability to explain complex military concepts clearly

 • Strong research discipline and news judgment

 • Ability to evaluate multiple sources and distinguish confirmed information from speculation

 • Experience working with Google Docs, Slack, and Notion



AI tools may be used for brainstorming or organizing information, but the final script writing must be your own work.



?



Nice to Have



Experience or deep knowledge in areas such as:

 • carrier aviation operations

 • naval air defense

 • maritime interdiction

 • ISR operations

 • aviation ordnance

 • surface warfare

 • NATO or U.S. tactical doctrine



Additional helpful skills include OSINT research techniques, satellite imagery interpretation, geolocation basics, ADS-B or MarineTraffic familiarity, and reading official defense releases.



Prior experience writing YouTube documentaries or television news scripts is also valuable.



?



Work Environment

 • Fully remote position

 • Must be available for tea
etings aligned with Cyprus time (Asia/Nicosia) in the afternoon hours

 • Communication primarily through Slack



Workflow tools include:

 • Google Docs for scriptwriting

 • Notion for task management and briefs

 • Dropbox or Google Drive for references

 • Google Meet for team discussions



All content must rely strictly on open sources. No classified or restricted information may be used, and uncertain information must always be clearly identified.



?



Current and Future Content Focus



Immediate topics:

Event-driven stories such as strikes on logistics hubs, drone shoot-downs, naval interdictions, and other developing military events.



Future content:

Evergreen educational videos explaining military systems and doctrine, such as how aircraft carriers operate, how CIWS protects ships, or how strike packages are coordinated.



?



What Success Looks Like

 • Scripts that editors can easily convert into videos thanks to clear pacing and visual guidance

 • Strong viewer retention within the first 60–120 seconds driven by a compelling hook

 • Accurate, confident writing with an expert voice that remains approachable and engaging



?



Compensation



Compensation is competitive and based on experience.



We are open to per-script or monthly arrangements, with potential bonuses based on reliability and output quality.



Please include your expected rate when applying.



?



How to Apply



Send an
 including:

 • Your resume or military service summary (branch, role/MOS/AFSC, systems or platforms you’re familiar with, and years of service)

 • Two writing samples, preferably related to defense, aviation, naval technology, or documentary-style writing

 • A short paragraph explaining a recent military or geopolitical event, including what happened, why it matters, and what visuals you would show in the first 60 seconds

 • Your timezone and availability, and confirmation that you can attend meetings during Cyprus afternoon hours

title: Breakthrough Bunker – Show Production Manager
description:
MMProductions is seeking a highly organized Production Manager to fully own the weekly

production of the Breakthrough Bunker, a live interview show focused on breakthrough

stories, resilience, and leadership.



This role manages the show from guest outreach through live broadcast execution. The

Production Manager ensures every episode is professionally prepared, guests are fully

onboarded, and the live production runs smoothly.



This position works directly with (Host) and coordinates with the marketing team for

promotional assets.



Core Responsibilities

Guest Outreach & Booking

• Identify and contact potential guests within our ecosystem

• Send outreach
s and schedule guest appearances

• Confirm availability and secure episode dates

• Maintain the show guest calendar



Guest Onboarding

• Send guest intake form and collect responses

• Ensure completion of guest survey and required materials

materials

• Monitor stream stability

• Assist with guest transitions if needed



Post-Show Coordination

• Ensure episode recording is saved

• Deliver recording files to media team



• Update show archive and guest records

• Schedule next episode production cycle



Weekly Workflow (8–12 hrs/week)

Monday–Tuesday: Guest outreach and scheduling

Wednesday: Guest research and profile preparation

Thursday: Production setup and guest confirmation

Show Day: Live production support (Wednesdays 7p - 9:30p EST)



Qualifications

• Podcast production experience

• Virtual event coordination

• Guest management

• Research and briefing preparation

• Professional
 communication

• Familiarity with streaming platforms



Skills Required

• Strong written communication

• Excellent organization and follow-up

• Ability to manage timelines and details

• Comfortable supporting live broadcasts

• Ability to work independently



Tools Used

• Google Docs / Google Drive

• Gmail /
 systems

• OneStream

• Social media platforms



• Research tools



Compensation

Part-Time Contractor

Estimated workload: 8–12 hours per week



Compensation range:

$300/month



Performance-based increases possible as the show grows.

To ensure you read this, write your favorite color in the subject of your application.



Reporting Structure

Reports directly to: (Host)



Works closely with:

• Operations team



Ideal Candidate

You enjoy coordinating moving parts, researching interesting people, producing high-

quality content, and supporting live shows behind the scenes.



You are someone who ensures nothing falls through the cracks.

title: US IT Recruiter
description:
We are a global IT consulting firm headquartered in Atlanta, GA, dedicated to building successful IT careers. We support our clients with project-based staffing across various technologies including Android and iPhone Mobile Development, AWS, Big Data, Data Science, Exchange, Cybersecurity, and Azure. With a growing base of around 500 clients globally, we've successfully built careers for thousands over the past two decades. Our mission is to help individuals and businesses find, build, and grow their next big dream. 



About the Role 

We are looking for a driven and detail-oriented IT Recruiter to join our growing team. In this role, you will be responsible for managing end-to-end recruitment processes, building relationships with candidates and hiring managers, and ensuring we attract top-tier IT talent across North America. You'll play a key role in shaping our talent acquisition efforts by combining smart sourcing strategies with strong candidate engagement and process management. 

We are looking for a motivated and results-driven Recruiter based in Philippines to join our growing team. This is a fully remote opportunity for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and is comfortable handling high-volume outbound calls daily.

If you enjoy speaking with candidates, screening talent quickly, and working with targets — this role is for you.

Key Responsibilities

• Conduct high-volume outbound calls (100–150+ calls per day) to source and screen candidates

• Qualify candidates based on client requirements

• Schedule interviews and coordinate with hiring managers

• Maintain accurate candidate records in ATS/CRM systems

• Follow up consistently with candidates

• Meet daily and weekly recruitment KPIs

• Source candidates through job portals, LinkedIn, referrals, and other platforms

Requirements

• 1–3+ years of experience in recruitment, sales, telemarketing, or high-volume calling roles

• Excellent verbal communication skills in English (B2+ or Native level preferred)

• Comfortable making 100+ calls per day

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment

• Stable internet connection and quiet workspace

Compensation

• Independent contractor (1099) structure

• Competitive monthly compensation (USD-based)

• Performance-based incentives

Ideal Candidate Profile

• Energetic and confident on calls

• Target-oriented and self-motivated

• Thick-skinned and resilient (not discouraged by rejection)

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, metrics-driven environment

title: Lead Generator/Business Development Representative
description:
Business Development Representative



Company: Vyynl

Location: New York City Metropolitan Area

Employment Type: Contract 

Compensation: Hourly/Contract Pay 



?



About Vyynl



Vyynl is a visual communications and graphic installation company specializing in custom design solutions for constructed environments. From concept to completion, we transform spaces through environmental graphics, vinyl installations, branded signage, murals, and experiential design.



Beyond our commercial work, Vyynl invests directly in youth development through Vyynl Labs, our school enrichment initiative focused on digital design, creative leadership, and real world project exposure. We work closely with principals, operations leaders, small business owners, and community organizations throughout New York City to strengthen identity, visibility, and culture through thoughtful design and disciplined project management.



We are building something long term. We are not looking for someone to simply make calls. We are looking for someone who understands how to open doors and create real opportunities.



?



Role Overview



Vyynl is seeking a Business Development Representative to lead outbound outreach and strategic lead generation efforts across our core verticals:



• NYC public schools

• Commercial storefronts and retail businesses

• Real estate developers and property managers

• Community organizations and nonprofits



This role is responsible for identifying qualified opportunities, initiating conversations with decision makers, and setting up high value meetings for the leadership team.



You will be the first impression of Vyynl.



?



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation

• Build and maintain prospect lists across targeted NYC zip codes

• Identify principals, assistant principals, operations managers, and facilities leads within DOE schools

• Identify business owners, property managers, and commercial operators in need of visual upgrades

• Track all activity in CRM or internal tracking system



Outreach and Appointment Setting

• Conduct cold outreach via phone,
, and LinkedIn

• Develop personalized outreach messages aligned with Vyynl’s brand voice

• Schedule discovery meetings and site surveys for the project management team

• Follow up consistently to move prospects through pipeline



Pipeline Development

• Qualify leads based on budget, decision authority, and project timeline

• Work closely with Creative Director and Project Manager to transition warm leads

• Maintain clear documentation of communication history



Community Relationship Building

• Attend select networking events or school meetings when needed

• Support strategic partnerships with school administrators and local business associations



?



What We Are Looking For



• 1 to 3 years of experience in sales, outreach, lead generation, or business development

• Strong verbal and written communication skills

• Confidence speaking with school administrators and business owners

• Organized and process oriented

• Comfortable with outbound outreach and rejection

• Based in NYC preferred



Bonus Experience

• Experience working with NYC DOE schools

• Familiarity with signage, construction, branding, or creative services

• Existing relationships in Brooklyn, Queens, or surrounding boroughs



Why Vyynl



You will not be selling a generic service.

You will be opening doors that transform schools, businesses, and community spaces.



You will help secure projects that create real visual impact and long term partnerships.



Vyynl is scaling intentionally. We value discipline, execution, and long term thinking. If you are ambitious, relationship driven, and ready to build something meaningful, this role is for you.

title: Amazon PPC Manager & Growth Strategist
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking an Amazon PPC Manager / Growth Strategist who excels in campaign execution, data

analysis, and clear communication. This role goes beyond bid management; it requires understanding the

entire Amazon ecosystem and using PPC as a lever for sustainable brand growth. You will work closely

with clients, analyze performance, and identify when challenges lie outside PPC, guiding brands toward

holistic improvements.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Strategic PPC Management

- Execute and optimize Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns

using both the Ads Console and Bulk Files.

- Conduct advanced keyword research using tools like Helium 10 and Data Dive, structuring campaigns

and bidding strategies around profitable growth.

- Monitor performance metrics (CTR, CVR, ACOS, TACoS) and present clear, actionable analysis.



Holistic Account Management

- Analyse the full picture of an account: understand how PPC velocity drives organic ranking, how

organic trends should inform PPC aggression, and how all levers interact.

- Identify when the real bottleneck is outside the ad campaigns - whether it is SEO, creative, pricing,

inventory, or competitor activity - and proactively raise it.



Listing and Conversion Advocacy

- Actively audit the Product Detail Page (PDP) and flag issues with title, bullets, images, A+ content, or

reviews that are limiting CVR.

- Suggest specific, actionable improvements to ensure the listing supports the PPC investment.



Client Communication

- Translate complex account data into clear, honest strategy updates.

- Proactively communicate what is working, what is not, and what the plan is - before being asked.



Process Improvement

- Audit existing SOPs and internal workflows. If you see a better way, say so and help implement it.

- Contribute to building a stronger, more effective team over time.



IDEAL CANDIDATE

- Analytical by nature: you think in patterns, not tasks. You look at data and ask 'Why?' before asking

'What do I do now?'

- High agency: if you spot a problem, you investigate and propose a solution without waiting to be

asked.

- Holistic thinker: you connect the dots between ad performance, organic positioning, listing quality, and

business results.

- Technically skilled: comfortable working in Bulk Files, SQP reports, and Excel/Sheets at a high level.

- Honest communicator: you can explain your reasoning clearly and directly. We value straight answers

over polished ones.

- Coachable and curious: open to feedback, willing to challenge your own assumptions, and always

looking to improve.



Instructions

-Please send your CV to 
 with a subject "AMZ PPC Application M26 - [Your Name]"



WHO WE ARE NOT LOOKING FOR

- Checklist operators who only follow SOPs without initiative or critical thinking.

- Yes-men. We actively want you to challenge our thinking if the data says otherwise.

- Silo specialists who treat SEO, creative, or listing quality as someone else's problem.

- Vanity metric chasers. Hitting a 10?OS while losing market share is not a win.

- Part-timers or freelancers. This is a 100% full-time position.



SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE

Within 6 months, you will manage a portfolio of brand accounts end-to-end with full autonomy. You will

have contributed to improving our internal processes, delivered measurable growth to clients, and become

a trusted technical voice within the team



Instructions

title: Video Editor — Remote (Per-Project Pay, Ongoing Work)
description:
Video Editor — Remote (Per-Project Pay, Ongoing Work)



About Us:



We're ECS Agency, a UK-based done-for-you online course creation company. We build complete course businesses for coaches and consultants — including video production, editing, and platform setup. We're growing fast and need reliable video editors to join our team on a per-project basis.



The Role



You'll be editing online course videos and 7-day challenge videos for our clients. This includes:



- Editing pre-recorded videos using our proprietary editing tool (EVEI) — adding graphics, intros/outros, lower thirds, and polishing the final product

- Working with HeyGen AI avatars — uploading scripts, generating videos, quality-checking outputs, and preparing them for editing

- Delivering finished, polished videos ready for upload to course platforms



This is ongoing work — not a one-off project. We have 20+ active clients at any time and are growing. Top performers will get priority on new projects.



Per-Project Pay:

7-day challenge — client filmed (7 videos, edit only) $25

7-day challenge — HeyGen (7 videos, generate + edit) $40

8-module course — client filmed (32 videos, edit only) $80

8-module course — HeyGen (32 videos, generate + edit) $150



Expect 3-5+ projects per week depending on capacity and quality. That's $120-$750+ per week for consistent, reliable editors.



What We're Looking For



- Experience with video editing (Capcut, Premiere, DaVinci, or similar — we'll train you on our specific tool)

- Reliable and communicative — if you take a project, you deliver on time

- Attention to detail — these videos represent our clients' businesses

- Comfortable working with AI tools (HeyGen experience is a plus but not required — we'll train you)

- Fast turnaround — most projects should be completed within 48-96 hours of assignment

- Available to start immediately



Why This Role Works



- Work from home, set your own hours

- Per-project means you control your earnings — the faster and better you work, the more you make

- Ongoing, consistent work — this isn't a one-time gig

- Simple, repeatable process with templates and tools provided

- Room to grow as we scale



How to Apply



Send a short message with:



1. A link to your portfolio or 2-3 examples of videos you've edited

2. Your typical turnaround time for a 10-minute video edit

3. Which of the four project types above you're most experienced with

4. Your availability (hours per day you can dedicate)



We'll send a paid test task ($10) to shortlisted applicants so you can try our workflow before committing.

title: Lead Verification - Phone Screening Specialist
description:
*****IMPORTANT - Please send a 
 video to apply to this job answering the questions below******



Motivated Leads is looking for a detail-oriented and results-driven Vetting Specialist to evaluate and qualify inbound leads. This role involves calling potential sellers to confirm their intent to sell and filtering out unqualified leads (e.g., those just seeking a price, bad phone numbers, properties listed on the MLS). The ideal candidate is proactive, confident on the phone, and capable of working independently with minimal oversight.



Key Responsibilities

- Quick Lead Evaluation: Assess incoming leads within 3 minutes of entry into the system.

- Property Verification: Research properties using Google and other tools to confirm they are single-family homes.

- Lead Contact: Call each lead promptly to confirm their intent to sell and verify contact information.

- Skip Tracing & Data Collection: Ensure the lead is associated with a real person and obtain their first and last name.

- Lead Dispositioning: Assign the correct status based on established guidelines (Approved, Declined, or Pending Review).

- Declined Lead Review: Participate in a daily double-vetting process to ensure no valid leads are mistakenly declined.

- Collaboration: Work closely with the Vetting Team and Process Owner to refine lead qualification criteria and improve accuracy.



What We’re Looking For

- Phone Confidence: Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls and engaging with potential sellers.

- Strong Communication Skills: Must speak fluent English with a native-sounding accent and be able to build quick rapport.

- Independence & Initiative: Able to work with little oversight, follow established guidelines, and make judgment calls when needed.

- Detail-Oriented: Ability to accurately assess leads and apply criteria to approve or decline them.

- Tech-Savvy: Familiarity with CRM tools, skip tracing software, and Google research.



Requirements

- Experience: Prior experience in sales, real estate lead qualification, customer service, or a related field is a plus.

- Work Environment: Ability to work remotely with a quiet workspace and reliable internet.



Availability: Flexible hours, but must be responsive within designated timeframes.

- Why Join Motivated Leads?

- Competitive Pay with performance-based incentives.

- Remote Work – Work from anywhere with a solid internet connection.

- Fast-Paced & Supportive Team – Join a growing company focused on real estate lead generation.

- Growth Opportunities – Potential for advancement into higher roles based on performance.



Loom Questions

Tell us about your experience with outbound calling. How do you approach calls to ensure a positive and productive conversation with potential leads?



How do you verify and qualify information during an outbound call? Walk us through your process for confirming details and ensuring accuracy.



Describe a time when you had to make a quick judgment call on whether a lead or contact was worth pursuing. What factors did you consider, and what was the outcome?



This role requires independence and initiative. Can you give an example of a time when you took the lead on a task with minimal oversight and improved a process or achieved a successful outcome?

title: Manufacturing Project Manager
description:
Do you thrive on turning big ideas into beautifully crafted realities? Are you the kind of person who gets excited by timelines, thrives under pressure, and loves making every detail count? At Styled Settings, we’re not just designing kitchen products—we’re creating experiences that inspire joy and elevate everyday life.



We are seeking a highly motivated and disciplined project manager who genuinely enjoys the complexities of managing projects end-to-end and possesses a robust understanding of the manufacturing process, especially in a global supply chain environment.



As our Order Project Manager, you’ll be at the heart of it all, orchestrating the product's journey to ensure it is delivered exactly as designed and at exceptional quality.



Reporting to our Head of Supply Chain, this is your chance to lead critical product manufacturing projects. You will work across time zones, collaborating closely with our manufacturing partners, particularly those in China, and our creative teams in the USA.



Key Responsibilities and Project Management Focus

This role requires strong project management skills and a proactive approach to managing the entire order lifecycle. You will own every aspect of the process, ensuring all milestones are met:



Project and Task Management: Implement and manage robust project plans, utilizing professional tools to track and sequence all activities. You will be familiar with managing milestones, creating and maintaining Gantt charts, and assigning and tracking tasks to keep the project moving forward.



Factory Collaboration: Understand how to work effectively with factories, navigating production schedules, quality requirements, and logistical constraints to ensure product integrity.



Creative-to-Production Alignment: Align creative artwork (provided by our creative team) with precise production requirements and technical specifications.



Quality Control Management: Oversee quality assurance, coordinating inspection schedules, and working with vendors to resolve production risks and issues promptly.



Communication & Reporting: Deliver consistent, top-notch updates that keep leadership and cross-functional partners in the loop regarding project status, risks, and successful milestone completion.



Whether it’s tackling inspection schedules, resolving production risks, or fine-tuning workflows, your impact will be visible in every Styled Settings product that reaches a customer’s hands.



Who Should Apply?

We’re looking for a master multitasker who can juggle complexity of multiple projects with grace, a proactive problem-solver who thinks three steps ahead, and a detail-driven communicator who thrives on collaboration. You don’t need to be an expert in kitchenware—just someone who enjoys being part of product manufacturing on track beautifully and with quality, and has the drive to see projects.



Preferred Experience:



Project Management Expertise

3+ years of experience managing complex, end-to-end projects. Must be skilled and comfortable with formal project management tools like Gantt charts, milestone tracking, and task management (e.g., ClickUp, Google Sheets).



Manufacturing Acumen

Demonstrated understanding of the product development and manufacturing cycle, including coordinating with factories and managing production timelines. Experience with international vendors (bonus points for experience in China) is highly valued.



Educational Background (Preferred)

A degree in any science or engineering (Industrial, Mechanical, etc.), Industrial Design, or a related technical field is preferred.  The roll requires that you are able to track detailed, coordinate with multiple parties, think in terms of systems,  ability to anticipate sequences of tasks/events, and ability to quickly learn the key points on our product portfolio.



Leadership and Communication

Laser-focused on tracking every dependency and risk while delivering clear, professional updates to leadership. A champion for anticipating challenges and crafting solutions.



Join Styled Settings and become part of a company that’s passionate about creating products that make life more beautiful—and a workplace where your contributions truly matter. Let’s create something extraordinary together!



(Apply Here:
)

title: Construction Billing & Pay Applications Assistant
