title: AI Systems Architect & Operations Manager
description:
About Metaone:

We are Metaone, a global marketing agency based in Canada, with a supporting operations team in China. We help international businesses dominate across all major social media platforms: Meta 
 & Instagram), TikTok, and Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book).



We are looking for a highly capable AI Systems Architect to build our automation infrastructure entirely from the ground up and act as the operational bridge between our international teams. We provide the budget and will pay for all necessary software subscriptions (ChatGPT Plus, 
, Anti-Detect Browsers, Proxies, etc.). We want a builder who will take complete ownership of our backend operations and run them flawlessly.



What You Will Do:



Ground-Up Architecture: Design and build our complete automation ecosystem from scratch using tools like 
, Zapier, and custom APIs. You will connect our content generation, translation, and posting pipelines across
, Instagram, TikTok, and Xiaohongshu.



Global Team Coordination: Act as the central operational hub between our Canadian management/sales team (EST) and our China support team (Beijing time). You will ensure seamless communication, route captured leads to the Canadian team for closing, and coordinate with the China team for cultural quality assurance on XHS content.



Secure Infrastructure Setup: Establish a bulletproof network using Anti-Detect browsers (e.g., AdsPower) and proxies to safely manage dozens of client accounts globally without triggering platform bans.



Daily Operations & Lead Capture: Once the system is built, manage the daily workflow. Ensure the AI is generating high-quality bilingual content, posting smoothly, and successfully scraping/routing potential leads from all platform inboxes.



System Upgrades & Optimization: The AI landscape moves fast. You are expected to proactively research and test new tools. If you find a faster, safer, or better way to automate our processes, you have the authority and company budget to implement it.



What We Are Looking For:



Proven Builder: You must have concrete experience building complex automation workflows from scratch.



Global Communicator: Highly organized and comfortable working with international teams across different time zones (Canada and China).



Infrastructure Knowledge: Deep understanding of secure account management, proxies, and anti-detect browsers to keep client profiles 100% safe across strict platforms like Xiaohongshu.



Advanced AI Prompting: Expertise in engineering AI prompts that can accurately translate English concepts into natural, culturally relevant Chinese social media content.



Autonomous Professional: You do not need to be micromanaged. You are given a goal, and you build the professional systems required to achieve it.

title: Amazon PPC Specialist (KDP Book Advertising)
description:
### About the Project



We've just published a beautiful bilingual (German/English) children's coloring book available on Amazon KDP. The book introduces young readers to the story of Islam through engaging illustrations and storytelling.



Now we need a **rockstar Amazon PPC specialist** to put this book in front of the right audience and make it a bestseller in its niche!



### What You'll Do



- Set up, manage, and optimize **Amazon Sponsored Products** and **Sponsored Brands** campaigns for our KDP book across 
 and 

- Conduct **keyword research** specifically for children's books, Islamic education, and bilingual coloring books

- Monitor and optimize **ACoS / TACoS** to ensure profitable ad spend

- Perform **bid management** and adjust targeting strategies based on performance data

- Analyze **search term reports** and add/remove keywords for maximum ROI

- Provide **weekly performance reports** with clear insights and recommendations

- Help optimize the **book listing** (title, description, keywords, A+ Content) for better conversion rates



### What We're Looking For



- **2+ years** of hands-on Amazon PPC experience (KDP / book advertising experience is a BIG plus!)

- Strong understanding of **Amazon Ads Console** and **KDP dashboard**

- Experience with tools like **Helium 10**, **Publisher Rocket**, or similar keyword research tools

- Data-driven mindset with excellent **analytical skills**

- Ability to work with **small budgets** and maximize every dollar

- Strong written English communication

- Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision



### Bonus Points For



- Experience advertising books on **
 (German marketplace)**

- Understanding of the **Islamic children's book** niche

- Familiarity with **A+ Content** creation for KDP

- Experience with **Amazon Brand Registry**



### Why Work With Us?



- Be part of a meaningful project bringing **Islamic education** to children worldwide

- **Flexible hours** — work on your own schedule

- **Long-term opportunity** — we plan to expand with more titles in the series

- Performance bonuses for hitting sales milestones



### How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



1. Start your message with the word **"Bismillah"** (so we know you read the full posting)

We're excited to find the right person to help to reach thousands of families! ????

title: Music Producer & Support Assistant
description:
Part-Time Music Producer & Support Assistant

Fast-Growing Audio Startup



We are an Australian audio startup creating tools and sounds for music producers around the world, and we are looking for someone who genuinely lives and breathes music.



This is a part-time role where you will work directly with the business owner. You will not be a small cog in a big machine. You will be close to the action, helping shape real products that producers use every day. For the right person, there is also the potential to grow into a more senior or leadership role as the company expands.



What you will be doing



Audio editing and music labelling:

Editing and cleaning up audio files, then tagging and organising loops, one-shots, stems and other content so producers can quickly find what they need.



Sample and MIDI pack creation:

Helping build and structure sample and MIDI packs, making sure everything feels useful, inspiring and ready to drop straight into a project.



Creating plugin presets:

Designing presets for our plugins, dialling in sounds that feel musical, modern and immediately usable for a wide range of producers.



Customer support:

Replying to customers by
 or chat, helping with downloads, installations, basic troubleshooting and general questions, and communicating in a friendly, clear and reliable way.



Why this job is worth getting excited about



You will be working directly with the founder, not buried inside a large team. Your work will be used by real producers, not just stored away in a folder. You will get an inside look at how a modern audio business is built, from products to customers to growth. As the company grows, there is real potential for you to step into a bigger role if you show initiative and deliver great work.



If you are someone who can happily spend hours in a DAW, cares about sound quality, is organised and also enjoys helping people, this is a chance to turn that into meaningful work.

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
KittySpout is looking for a Direct Response Video Editor to join our team!



In your application/subject message to us put the word "KITTY" or your application will be denied.



As our video editor, you will be responsible for editing, producing, and managing multiple creative

projects with a heavy focus on paid ad creatives for Meta Platforms. You’ll take raw UGC and

transform it into high-converting direct response ads that scale across our paid channels.

We are looking to hire someone with 3+ years of work experience. The ideal candidate has prior

experience editing DTC e-commerce ads, understands direct response principles, and knows how to

structure short-form and long form video content that captures attention and drives conversions.



Who are we?

At KittySpout, we are transforming cats and their parents’ lives by developing products designed with

the help of expert veterinarians to create products that make taking care of cats easier while also

helping improve the health and happiness of cats around the world. We've scaled quickly to become

a multi 8-figure brand in under 4 years through viral digital marketing. KittySpout has helped over

600,000+ cat owners in just 4 years since launching with a small (but mighty) core team of under 20

people — and we are looking to continue our growth by finding a great video editor to play a pivotal

role in scaling!



What is our culture like & who is a good fit?

Culture-fit is our #1 factor when hiring! We have a genuine will-to-win. No work is beneath us if it

moves us towards our goals. We utilize creativity to do more with less – and quickly. We use data to

make decisions and live by the following three core values: work smart, overdeliver, speed is king,

and better everyday. We love learning – every problem is an opportunity to grow.



If you want a stress-free corporate 9-5 job, this isn’t it.

If you want to challenge yourself and shape a fast-growing company, work directly with the founders,

and see huge career growth by playing a big role in scaling it to $100m+… If you want to drive results

with a group of passionate, smart, hardworking people, work in an environment without politics or

corporate chicanery, and play a big part in our growth being hands-on and active, all while having a

generous performance bonus structure — then you’ve come to the right place.



Key Objectives

Consistent volume of 3 ad briefs per day (3 variants each)

Increase your performance bonus by analyzing prior video metrics to increase views and conversions.

Apply direct-response copywriting principles to review scripts.

Operate with a high degree of autonomy, managing your daily workload efficiently to meet

deadlines without needing hand-holding or frequent check-ins.

Quickly learn and master new tools and software, and editing techniques as social media

trends evolve, often with less than a day's notice.

Ensure every video meets our exacting quality standards and perfectly matches the provided

instructions, minimizing the need for revisions.

Maintain clear, proactive communication with the company founders and executive team,

providing updates when necessary.

Create ad variations and iterations to scale winning ads and improve performance.

Collaborate with the creative strategy team to bring ad concepts to life.

Apply direct response marketing principles to editing (hooks, problem/solution flow,

testimonials, CTAs).

Stay up to date on internet trends and editing styles to ensure our ads feel native and

engaging.



Requirements

Fully remote.

Fluent in English.

Proven experience creating short-form direct-response videos for DTC brands.

Proven experience with professional video-editing software is required. We have a strong

preference for CapCut Pro, but proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro is also acceptable.

Paid Ad Focus: Proven experience editing Meta/Facebook paid ads that convert.

Volume: Comfortable producing 3 ad briefs per week.

Tools: Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (or equivalent editing tools).

Creative & Analytical Mindset: Ability to combine storytelling with data-driven feedback to

refine and improve ads.

No issue working overtime or on weekends if needed. You’re passionate about your work and

excited by the idea of producing ads that millions will see.

Excellent cultural fit as per our values above.

Excited to play a big role in scaling the company and work closely with the founders.



KPI’S you will own

3 daily briefs Quota

80% First-Pass Approval Rate: At least 80% of submissions require no revisions.



Accountabilities

Deliver 3 ad briefs per day

Weekly iterations on top-performing ads to drive continuous improvement.

Ensure ads are visually compelling, on-brand, and optimized for performance.

Work with the creative team to brainstorm and test new ad concepts.

Stay plugged into social media/UGC trends to keep our creatives fresh and competitive.

Troubleshoot underperforming campaigns by testing different edits, structures, and hooks.



This Role Is Not For You If

You are a meticulous video perfectionist who will spend hours refining a single transition or

effect. With a high daily quota, success in this role demands efficiency. Adhering perfectly to

the video template at speed is valued over spending extra time on minor details that don’t

contribute to views or conversions.

You thrive in highly collaborative, team-oriented environments with frequent meetings and

brainstorming sessions. This is a high-autonomy, "heads-down" role where you will be

working independently the majority of the time to meet your individual production goals.

You are a methodical planner who prefers stable, long-term projects and predictable

workflows. Our environment is inherently dynamic. The tools, guidelines, and video styles

can change overnight, and you must be able to pivot instantly without frustration.



How Our Hiring Works & How We Operate

When hiring, we’ll work with you to define the KPIs you’ll be responsible for and set targets. This

removes ambiguity around wondering if you’re doing a good job after you start.

Initial soft interview, then a technical interview + test project with the current head of marketing, and

a final interview to ensure culture fit. We plan to hire within ~8–12 days of conducting these

interviews. We pride ourselves on timely responses and updates for applicants.

For this role, we will walk you through the long-term vision and opportunities that have us excited

about this business — and how you fit in. We will show you our current structure and where we are

headed.

title: Creative Designer – E-commerce Ads & Product Visuals
description:
Creative Designer – E-commerce Ads & Product Visuals

Pay: $3-7 USD/hour (based on experience and speed)



We’re looking for a Creative Designer who understands how to create visuals that drive conversions — not just look good.



You’ll be working with a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the US selling products in the home, bathroom and beauty appliance space.



Your main responsibility will be designing high-performing static creatives for Meta ads as well as product visuals and infographics for our product pages.



For Meta creatives you will work closely with our team and creative strategist to turn marketing angles and product insights into scroll-stopping visuals that communicate the offer clearly.



What You’ll Do



• Design high-converting static ad creatives for Meta paid campaigns

• Create product visuals and infographics for product pages (PDP)

• Translate marketing angles and hooks into clear visual communication

• Test different creative directions, layouts, and messaging styles

• Iterate based on feedback and performance insights

• Work independently and deliver creatives consistently



Requirements



• Strong experience with Figma or Canva

• Experience creating e-commerce / DTC ad creatives

• Understanding of direct-response marketing and paid media ads

• Strong eye for layout, typography, hierarchy, and clarity

• Ability to communicate product benefits visually

• Experience with AI creative tools such as Higgsfield, Artlist, or similar

• Reliable, organized, and able to work independently



Proof of Experience (Important)



To apply, you must provide:



• At least 5 product visuals or infographics you created for e-commerce product pages

• At least 5 ad creatives that scaled to €500/day or more in ad spend

• Proof of performance (screenshots or campaign data)



Applications without proof of scaled creatives will not be considered.



What We Offer



• Fully remote – work from anywhere

• Flexible schedule – we care about output, not hours

• Work with experienced e-commerce founders

• Your creatives will be used in live paid advertising campaigns

• Long-term opportunity if performance is strong



Trial Period



We run a 3-day paid trial with selected candidates.



During the trial you will receive:



• A product brief

• Creative angles

• Tasks related to ad creatives and PDP visuals



This allows both sides to see if we’re a good fit.



We’re looking for someone who can take initiative, move fast, and deliver strong creatives without constant supervision.



How to Apply

title: IP Protection Manager (DMCA / Anti-Piracy / Brand Enforcement)
description:
Role summary



Bublishing is hiring an experienced IP Protection Manager to stop piracy, impersonation, and unauthorized sellers across search, social, and marketplaces. This is a hands-on, execution-led role for someone who can run enforcement end-to-end, build a repeatable system, and prioritize actions that recover revenue—not just file complaints.



You’ll own detection, evidence collection, takedown submissions, follow-ups/escalations, and reporting with minimal oversight. As we scale, you may manage contractors/associates, but ownership is the core requirement.



What you’ll protect



We publish books and related content. Common issues include:

• Pirated PDFs/epubs, “free download” sites, and piracy link networks.

• Fake/impersonation pages using our author/brand assets.

• Unauthorized marketplace listings (e.g., Amazon), counterfeit-like activity, brand misuse.

• Misleading ads/posts redirecting to infringing pages.

• Copycats using our cover designs, descriptions, titles, or brand name.



Platforms in scope



Primary:

• Google Search / indexed piracy pages

• Meta 
/Instagram pages, ads, posts, shops)

• Amazon (infringing listings, hijackers, brand misuse)

• TikTok, YouTube,
/Link aggregators, Shopify stores, other marketplaces



Outcomes + KPIs (how performance is judged)



Primary KPI: Recovered revenue impact (you define the methodology and track it consistently)



Requirements

• Proven DMCA/IP enforcement experience across Google + Meta + Amazon.

• Comfortable handling piracy/copycat sellers in book publishing or digital content.

• Extremely organized: strong documentation, clear communication, fast turnaround.

• Ability to work independently and make judgment calls on prioritization.

• Metrics-minded: can define and defend a reasonable recovered revenue methodology.



Please submit your application at zurl.to/FmW4?source=CareerSite.

title: Logistics Coordinator
description:
You will be responsible for end-to-end coordination of international freight movements — primarily FCL/LCL container shipments from supplier origin (China, Japan, Thailand, South Africa) to Australia and Zimbabwe. You will manage bookings, documentation, supplier follow-up, and shipping line liaison, working closely with our on-the-ground Zimbabwe contact for the African corridor.Manage container bookings (FCL/LCL) with freight forwarders and shipping lines

Prepare and review all shipping documentation — Bills of Lading, commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, phytosanitary/CBCA certificates as required

Track shipments from origin to destination and proactively manage exceptions and delays

Liaise with Australian customs brokers for DAFF/ABF clearance requirements

Coordinate with clearing agents and our Zimbabwe local contact for Beira port and border clearance

Monitor vessel schedules, port cut-offs, and transit times across key routes (China–Brisbane, China–Beira, Thailand–Durban, etc.)

Maintain a shipment tracker and provide regular status updates to management

Obtain and compare freight quotes from multiple forwarders

Manage supplier relationships for logistics documentation compliance

Flag issues early — delays, documentation errors, demurrage risk, permit requirements

title: Performance Graphic Designer for Ecommerce Ads (Meta Ads / DTC Brand)
description:
We are looking for a Graphic Designer with experience creating image ads for ecommerce, specifically for Meta ads.



This role focuses on designing advertising creatives for paid ads. We are not looking for someone who simply places text on top of an image. We are looking for someone with strong visual judgment who understands how to think about an ad: what message it should communicate, what emotion it should trigger, and how to structure it visually to capture attention within seconds.



The right profile understands how to design image ads that stop the scroll, communicate the product’s benefit quickly, and maintain a professional, premium look consistent with a strong brand. It is important to understand the ideal customer — their problems, motivations, and emotions — and translate that into clear and persuasive visual creatives.



We also value designers who understand the role of copy within an ad: knowing what headlines to use, which phrases truly address the customer’s problem, and how to structure the message visually so the ad becomes compelling and engaging.



We expect strong design judgment: clear visual hierarchy, well-chosen typography, strong contrast, and compositions that guide the viewer’s attention to the most important elements. We particularly value designers who pay attention to details such as well-integrated backgrounds, natural shadows, believable lighting, and clean, professional compositions.



Work schedule:

Monday to Friday — 2 hours per day.



If the collaboration works well, hours may increase over time. We are looking for a stable, long-term collaboration.



Responsibilities:



• Design high-converting image ads

• Create advertising and promotional creatives

• Improve product images and website visuals

• Apply clear visual hierarchy (headline ? benefit ? product)

• Recreate and improve ads based on existing references

• Create original ad concepts from scratch based on the product and customer problem



Requirements:



• Strong experience with Photoshop, Figma, or Illustrator

• Experience designing advertising creatives for ecommerce or DTC brands

• Strong understanding of visual hierarchy, typography, and contrast

• Ability to create designs built to capture attention in ads

• Strong design taste and attention to detail



Important:



We are NOT looking for designers who only create Amazon-style infographics, social media posts, or basic Canva-style designs.



We are also not looking for creatives that simply list information. We want ads that are thoughtfully designed to capture attention, communicate a clear message, and generate interest.



We especially value portfolios that demonstrate:



• Strong use of contrast and visual hierarchy

• Clean and well-structured compositions

• Careful use of typography and headlines

• Natural integration of product, backgrounds, shadows, and lighting



To apply, please include:



• Your portfolio showing ads designed for ecommerce or Meta ads

• Also answer this question:

         If you had to improve a mediocre image ad, what are the first three things you would look at and why?

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
About Us:

At 4ocean, our mission is to save the world's oceans, and we are looking for passionate individuals to help us achieve this goal. We are more than just a company; we are a global movement committed to making a tangible difference in the health of our planet. We achieve this by removing plastic waste from the ocean and coastlines and advocating for sustainable change. If you are driven by purpose, motivated to contribute to a cause that truly matters, and eager to make a lasting impact on the environment, we want you on our team.



Role Overview

The Social Media Specialist creates, adapts, and deploys high-quality creative that performs across TikTok Paid, Meta Paid, YouTube, Google (Demand Gen/YouTube/Display), Yelp 1P, DTC,
/SMS, and third-party marketplaces.

We’re looking for a self-governing, fast, commercially minded creator who understands that creative is a core performance lever. You should be comfortable operating with minimal direction while staying aligned to brand guardrails, campaign priorities, and performance feedback.

AI is central to the workflow, but human judgment, brand sensibility and final creative control always sit on top. This role sits inside the paid performance engine, where speed, consistency and quality matter as much as ideas.



What You’ll Do

Paid Strategy & Planning

Support execution of performance-driven paid creative strategy.

Maintain weekly/monthly creative calendars aligned to campaigns and launches.

Translate briefs from Paid Media, Ecommerce and Marketing into platform-ready creative for TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google, Yelp 1P, DTC,
/SMS and marketplaces.

Propose creative angles, formats and tests based on performance trends.



Paid Creative Production

Produce platform-native assets including:

Short-form vertical video (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

Mid-form YouTube creative

Static images and carousels

UGC-style performance video

Write conversion-oriented hooks, captions and CTAs.

Optimize creative for pacing, framing, text density and platform best practices.

Ensure all work meets brand standards while feeling native to each channel.



AI-Powered Workflow

Use AI tools for hook generation, A/B testing, video editing, thumbnail/caption variants and rapid iteration at scale.

Balance efficiency with brand integrity, treating AI as a production amplifier, not the decision maker.



Publishing, QA & Alignment

Prepare assets to exact specs for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Yelp and marketplaces.

Partner closely with Paid Media teams/agencies for smooth implementation.

Maintain organized asset libraries and clear naming conventions.

Ecommerce & Marketplace Integration

Design creative that supports conversion and product discovery.

Align timing and messaging with DTC promotions, paid campaigns,
/SMS and marketplace initiatives.

Ensure marketplace assets meet platform requirements while preserving brand consistency.



Performance & Learning

Review results including CTR, CPC, CPA, CPV, hook rate, watch time and view-through signals.

Refine storytelling, structure and hooks based on data.

Share concise creative learnings with stakeholders.



Collaboration & Trends

Work cross-functionally with Paid Media, Ecommerce, Marketing and Creative teams.

Stay current on platform updates and ad best practices across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google and Yelp.



You Bring

2–5 years of experience in paid social creative, performance content, or e-commerce marketing.

Proven track record of high-performing short-form video and static paid assets.

Experience working with paid teams or agencies preferred.

Familiarity with YouTube and Google ad formats is a strong plus.

Comfort owning workflows and deliverables with minimal supervision.

Working knowledge of CTR, CPC, CPA, CPV, and hook rate.

Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

A portfolio demonstrating TikTok, Meta, YouTube and ecommerce-oriented paid creative is required.

Tools

Native ad tools across Meta, TikTok, Google, YouTube and Yelp.

Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent.

Hands-on experience with AI creative tools for variation and testing.

Ability to build scalable, repeatable creative workflows.

What Success Looks Like

Consistent delivery of high-quality, campaign-ready creative.

Reliable, on-time handoffs to Paid Media teams.

Improving creative efficiency and performance over time.

Clear contribution to paid-driven traffic and revenue across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google and Yelp 1P.

title: Instagram Social Media Manager
description:
### About the Project



A bilingual (German/English) children's coloring book that brings the story of Islam to life through beautiful illustrations. It's available on Amazon KDP — and now we need someone creative and passionate to **build our Instagram presence from the ground up!**



This is your chance to grow a brand from zero and make it your own.



### What You'll Do



- **Build and grow** our Instagram account from scratch targeting Muslim families, parents, educators, and homeschoolers

- Create a **content strategy** with a consistent posting schedule (minimum 4–5 posts/week)

- Design eye-catching **feed posts, carousels, Stories, and Reels** using book illustrations, behind-the-scenes content, and educational snippets

- Write engaging **captions in English and German** with relevant hashtags

- **Engage with the community** — respond to comments/DMs, interact with related accounts, build relationships with parenting and Islamic education influencers

- Research and implement a strong **hashtag strategy** for maximum organic reach

- Identify and reach out to **micro-influencers** in the Islamic parenting / children's education space

- Provide **monthly reports** on follower growth, engagement rate, and content performance

- Optionally manage **Instagram Ads** to drive traffic to our Amazon listing



### Content Ideas We Love



- Coloring page previews & time-lapse coloring videos

- "Did you know?" educational posts about Islam for kids

- Parent testimonials and user-generated content

- Seasonal content (Ramadan, Eid, Back-to-School)

- Interactive Stories (polls, quizzes, Q&A about the book)



### What We're Looking For



- **1+ years** of Instagram management experience with proven growth results

- Strong skills in **Canva** (or similar design tools) for creating visually appealing content

- Experience creating **Reels** and short-form video content

- Understanding of **Instagram's algorithm** and best practices for organic growth

- Excellent **English writing skills** for captions and community engagement

- Creative mindset with the ability to turn a children's book into a vibrant online brand

- Self-motivated and able to work independently



### Bonus Points For



- Experience in the **children's book**, education, or parenting niche

- **German language** skills (our book is bilingual!)

- Basic **video editing** skills (CapCut, InShot, or similar)

- Experience with **Instagram Ads Manager**

- Understanding of or personal connection to **Islamic culture and values**



### Why Work With Us?



- Help build a **meaningful brand** that educates children about Islam

- **Creative freedom** — bring your ideas and make this account shine

- **Flexible schedule** — work when inspiration strikes

- **Long-term partnership** — as we grow, your role and compensation grow too

- Performance bonuses for hitting follower and engagement milestones



### How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



1. Start your message with the word **"Salam"** (so we know you read the full posting)

2. Share **links to 2–3 Instagram accounts** you've managed (with before/after growth metrics)

3. Send a **sample post concept** for our book (just a quick idea — caption + visual description)

4. Your **expected hourly rate**

5. Your **availability** (hours per week and time zone)



Let's bring this book to life on Instagram together! ????

title: Funnel Builder (Remote)
description:
Join our fast-growing e-commerce company and help us build high-converting funnels across multiple international stores.



We’re looking for a highly skilled, detail-oriented, and proactive Funnel Builder who can create, optimize, and maintain funnels for our e-commerce stores.

You must be fast, organized, and extremely reliable — someone who loves building clean, high-performing funnels.



? What You Will Do (Responsibilities)

- Funnel Building & Design

- Build high-converting funnels inside Funnelish (or similar tools)

- Create and optimize: Advertorials 

                                       Salespages

                                       Checkout pages

                                       Upsells & downsells

                                       Thank-you pages

- Ensure perfect mobile responsiveness, clean layout, and strong UX

- Add product sections, reviews, testimonials, FAQs, feature blocks, and objection handlers

- Replicate competitor funnels and improving them with accuracy and speed

- Appliying the basics of direct response copywriting



Technical Setup

- Install & configure tracking pixels (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

- Set up domain connections, DNS, and integrations

- Add payment gateways (Stripe), shipping logic, and automations

- Ensure fast load speeds and stable funnel performance

- Troubleshoot technical issues quickly



Copy & Creative Implementation

- Insert and format copywriting provided by our team

- Place high-quality images, icons, product mockups, badges, and videos

- Follow brand guidelines consistently across all funnels

- Improve clarity, flow, and visual structure for maximum conversions

- Making prompts to generate the best possible images using text to image ai



Optimization & QA

- Fully optimize for mobile-first performance

- Deliver funnels that are “traffic-ready” without needing rework

- Follow internal SOPs and help improve them over time



???? What Success Looks Like (Expected Results)

- Funnels delivered fast, clean, and without errors

- Perfect mobile responsiveness and strong UX

- Fully working tracking, pixel, and payment integrations

- No broken elements, missing assets, or layout mistakes

- Funnels ready for advertising immediately

- Conversion rates improving month after month

- Clear and reliable communication with the team



? Requirements (Must-Have)

- Proven experience building funnels in Funnelish or simular tools

- Strong understanding of conversion-focused design and direct response copywriting 

- Ability to replicate competitor funnels accurately and improve them where the competitor lacks.

- Good English communication

- Familiar with CRO principles

- Strong problem-solving and technical troubleshooting skills

- Very detail-oriented — no broken layouts, spacing issues, or typos

- Fast learner who adapts to our systems

- Full-time availability (40 hours/week)

- Reliable computer + strong internet connection



? Bonus Skills (Highly Valuable)

- Experience specifically with Funnelish

- Experience building upsell/downsell sequences

- Experience with shopify payments (while traffic comes from funnelish)

- Basic HTML/CSS knowledge

- Experience setting up TikTok & Meta pixels

- Background in dropshipping or e-commerce

- Design skills (Figma, Photoshop, Canva, chatGPT)

- Prompts making with AI

- Image generation using Sora or simular ai tools

- Understanding of direct-response copywriting (Breakthrough Advertising, E5 Method, etc.)



???? What We Offer

- Long-term, stable full-time role

- 100% remote work

- A fast-growing company with strong systems and SOPs

- Supportive team environment

- Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

- Opportunities to grow into Head of Funnels or Funnel Manager



???? How to Apply

Please send us:

Your CV

Portfolio or examples of funnels you’ve built (links or screenshots)

Your experience with Funnelish or similar platforms

Your expected monthly salary (PHP) or hourly rate

Your availability

title: VA / Chat Sales Manager
description:
Are you driven, customer-focused, and ready to excel in sales? Join our team as a Customer Service Chat Sales Agent where you'll engage with customers via live chat, build connections, and drive sales in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.



This full-time, remote position is ideal for proactive, sales-driven candidates with strong English skills (C1 level or above) and high emotional intelligence to connect with customers. The role involves handling multiple chats to drive sales, with a performance-based pay structure, including hourly rates that increase with sales and a 2% commission. The position offers long-term career growth, bonuses, and a collaborative team environment.



Key Responsibilities:

- Initiate and lead engaging conversations with customers via chat, building connections and driving sales

- Maintain quick response times and uphold a high level of professionalism throughout all interactions

- Exceed sales targets by crafting creative, compelling messages that captivate and convert

- Multitask effectively, managing multiple chats without compromising quality

- Follow company guidelines and procedures to ensure a smooth customer experience



What We Offer:

- Fully Remote: Work from the comfort of your own space

- Competitive Pay: Performance-based pay with commission and bonus incentives

- Career Growth: Opportunities for advancement in a supportive, success-driven environment

- Team Culture: Join a talented team that values open communication, collaboration, and excellence



Requirements:

- High emotional intelligence (EQ) to understand and relate to customers' needs

- Fluency in English (C1 level) with strong written communication skills

- Reliable high-speed internet and access to a laptop or computer

- Availability to work 6 days a week, 8 hours per day

- Proactive mindset with excellent communication and copywriting skills

- Motivation to work hard and improve continuously in a fast-paced environment





How to Apply:

If this sounds like the role for you, send an application
 to 
 with the following information:

1. Full Name

2. Work Experience and Age

3. English Level

4. Why You Want This Job

5. Why You Would Excel in This Role



Hope to see you soon!

title: eBay Store Setup & Listing Migration Specialist (Etsy ? eBay)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented eCommerce assistant to fully set up our eBay store and migrate our listings from Etsy.



The Project (16-20 hours total)



We need someone to set up our eBay store from start to finish and copy our existing Etsy listings to eBay while optimizing them for the platform.



We will create the eBay business account, but everything else should be configured professionally.



This includes:



• eBay store setup

• Shipping profiles

• Payment settings

• Store categories

• Listing templates

• Listing migration from Etsy



This is a one-time project initially, but could lead to ongoing listing management work.



Scope of Work



1?? Full eBay Store Setup

Set up the eBay store properly for a vintage/antiques brand.



Tasks include:

• Configure store settings

• Set up shipping policies

• Set up return policies

• Configure payment settings

• Create store categories for our product types

• Create listing templates for consistency

• Ensure everything is optimized for US buyers



2?? Listing Migration (Etsy ? eBay)

You will copy our existing listings from Etsy into eBay.



For each listing:

• Copy listing title and optimize for eBay SEO

• Copy description and adjust formatting if needed

• Upload product photos

• Add item specifics

• Select appropriate category

• Add item condition (vintage / used)

• Set price

• Assign shipping profile



We currently have 50+ listings, with more added regularly.



3?? Listing Optimization

Make sure listings follow best practices for eBay search visibility.



This includes:

• Proper keyword formatting

• Correct categories

• Item specifics filled out properly

• Vintage item tagging where applicable



Deliverables



By the end of the project:

? Fully functional eBay store

? Store categories created

? Shipping and return policies configured

? Listing template created

? All Etsy listings copied to eBay

? Listings saved as drafts or published (depending on instruction)



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:

? Has experience setting up eBay stores

? Understands eBay SEO and listing structure

? Has experience with product listing migration (Etsy, Shopify, etc.)

? Is detail-oriented and organized

? Speaks and writes excellent English



Bonus if you have experience with:

• Vintage / antiques categories

• Etsy ? eBay listing migration

• eCommerce VA work



Estimated Project Size



Approximately:

100 listings



Typical listing setup time:

10–20 minutes per listing



Compensation: 20 hours total, $200 flat project rate.

title: CASA Drone Theoretical Teacher
description:
About the Company



iDrone Train, a division of iDrone Corp, is one of Australia’s leading drone training organisations delivering the Remote Pilot Licence (RePL) under the regulations of the Civil Aviation Safety Authority (CASA).



We train commercial drone pilots across Australia in industries such as construction, surveying, agriculture, and industrial cleaning. As part of our expansion, we are looking for a Drone Aviation Theory Instructor to assist in delivering the theoretical component of the Remote Pilot Licence (RePL) course online.



This is a fully remote position with the opportunity to work with a rapidly growing international drone technology company.



Role Overview



We are seeking a technically minded instructor to deliver the theoretical aviation training component of our drone pilot certification program via online classes and webinars.



The instructor will guide students through aviation theory including airspace, regulations, drone systems, meteorology, and operational safety.



All practical flight training and final licensing approvals will be handled by our Australian instructors.



Responsibilities



Deliver live online training sessions covering:



Australian drone regulations (CASA Part 101)



Airspace and aviation rules



Weather and meteorology for drone operations



Human factors and aviation safety



Drone systems and flight planning



Operational risk management



Additional responsibilities:



Answer student questions during training sessions



Conduct theory knowledge checks and quizzes



Assist with student onboarding and course support



Maintain high-quality training standards



Work closely with our Australian aviation team



Requirements



Essential:



Strong English speaking ability (clear neutral accent)



Strong presentation and teaching skills



Comfortable speaking to groups via Zoom or Google Meet



Strong technical understanding or interest in drones, aviation, or engineering



Reliable high-speed internet connection



Professional home office setup



Preferred:



Background in aviation, drones, engineering, or aviation training



Experience teaching technical subjects



Familiarity with drone flight operations



Experience with online training platforms or LMS systems



Bonus (not required):



Drone pilot experience



Aviation training background



Flight simulation or UAV experience



Training Provided



Successful applicants will receive full training on:



Australian drone regulations



iDrone Train training materials



Our drone training syllabus



Aviation theory modules



Long-term employment opportunity



Opportunity to grow into a Senior Aviation Instructor role



Work Schedule



Remote (Philippines)

Working with Australian students



Typical hours:



Part-time or full-time available



Training sessions typically run during Australian daytime hours



Why Work With Us



Work with one of Australia’s fastest growing drone companies



Join a company operating across multiple drone sectors including training, industrial cleaning, and heavy-lift operations



Work with cutting-edge drone technology



Opportunity for long-term career growth

title: Property Manager
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a Client Success Manager to manage a portfolio of residential rental properties. You’ll be the primary point of contact for clients and will coordinate with vendors, leasing, maintenance, and occasionally vendors to keep properties performing well and clients confident. We are hiring a Client Success Manager to manage a portfolio of residential rental properties. This is an execution and communication role. In this role your mantra will be systems, clean notes, accurate records, fast follow-through, proactive updates, and clear reporting. We operate with a “Good Data In  Great Results Out” methodology. Your ability to maintain accurate information and turn it into great decisions matters.





What You’ll Be Doing





1) Client Management & Communication



Conduct onboarding calls and set expectations using our Good Data In  Great Results Out approach.



Maintain detailed notes of all client communications both inbound & outbound.



Provide proactive outreach: portfolio updates and recommendations build productive relationships.



Respond to escalated client
s within SLA timeframes.



Obtain client approvals per policy before authorizing work.





2) Portfolio Operations, Leasing & Vacancy Control



Monitor vacancies and review showing/leasing reports weekly with clients and provide recommendations focused on keeping DOM low and increasing Resident retention. 



Setting rental rates using our Rental Analysis methodology.



Oversee unit turns to ensure they’re completed quickly and cost-effectively.







3) Maintenance & Vendor Coordination



Oversee maintenance workflows: requests, vendor coordination, approval ( If needed), completion close-out.



Oversee work orders documentation accuracy( notes, photos, invoices, approvals).



Follow up on open items to ensure tasks close and do not stall.



Review vendor performance and escalate recurring issues with a focus on a final resolution. 





4) Financial Oversight



Review and collect outstanding client payables in a timely manner.



Secure client funds as needed before approving work orders or expenses.



Review monthly owner statements for accuracy prior to dissemination.



Oversee legal filings against delinquent Residents. 







5) Compliance & Documentation



Maintain working knowledge of rental compliance basics and follow internal compliance checklists.



Ensure client and property compliance with all federal, state, and local regulations 



Store all client/property documents correctly using HWPM’s internal file structure.





How You’ll Be Measured



Collections: 90%+ of client payables collected within 45 days



Client Response Time: 90% of escalated client
s resolved within SLA



Owner Statements: 90% Accuracy in statement review before dissemination



Days on Market: Maintain DOM under 45 days for vacant units



Unit Turns: 95% of turns completed within 14 days of vacancy



Compliance: 100% of rental/lead registrations completed on time



Client Retention: Maintain 90%+ annual client retention







Requirements

Required Skills & Experience

2+ years of experience in long-term residential property management (U.S. portfolio experience is a plus).



Strong written and spoken English; professional client communication is a must.



Confident coordinating vendors, maintenance, unit turns, and leasing workflows.



Excellent organization: you track details, follow up without being reminded, and keep clean records.



Comfortable with property management systems (any of these is great): Buildium, AppFolio, and Rent Manager is preferred



Bachelor's Degree  



Ideal Candidate

You’re proactive: you don’t wait for problems to grow.



You’re systems-driven: accurate notes, consistent reporting, and clear documentation are normal for you.



You’re calm under pressure and can handle escalations with empathy and firmness.



Stakeholder mindset: you balance speed, cost, compliance, and resident experience.







Benefits

Compensation & Benefits

Probation Period- 12 weeks 200.00 per week. 



Post-Probation Full-time:



$280–$360/week ($1120-$1440) plus bonuses.

Based on performance & experience.



Paid Time Off (PTO): 



Accrues at 1 day per month 



Sick leave 5 Days per year 



13th Month Pay (Performance-Based)



Birthday Leave (Paid)



Philippine Government Reimbursements:

SSS: Up to ?2,400/month

PhilHealth: Up to ?800/month

Pag-IBIG: Up to ?800/month



Health Insurance Card



Language Bonus:



-Spanish fluency incentive



*Items 3,4,5,6, and 7 begin at the 6th month mark of employment. 



Required Skills & Experience



2+ years of experience in long-term residential property management (U.S. portfolio experience is a plus).

Strong written and spoken English; professional client communication is a must.

Confident coordinating vendors, maintenance, unit turns, and leasing workflows.

Excellent organization: you track details, follow up without being reminded, and keep clean records.

Comfortable with property management systems (any of these is great): Buildium, AppFolio, and Rent Manager is preferred.

Comfortable with task/project tools Zoho crm is preferred. 

Bachelor's Degree  

Ideal Candidate

You’re proactive: you don’t wait for problems to grow.

You’re systems-driven: accurate notes, consistent reporting, and clear documentation are normal for you.

You’re calm under pressure and can handle escalations with empathy and firmness.

Stakeholder mindset: you balance speed, cost, compliance, and resident experience.



Our Core Values

Accountability: We own and learn from mistakes.

Growth: In mindset, skill, and service.

Innovation: We always ask, “How can we do this better?”

Teamwork: We support each other to succeed.

Urgency: We act with intention and finish strong.

Communication: Clear, respectful, and frequent.

title: Shopify Marketing & E-commerce Coordinator (Remote)
description:
We are a leading pole fitness company with multiple studio locations across Melbourne, Australia. Our mission is to empower people through the art of pole dancing by promoting fitness, confidence, self expression and body positivity.



Alongside our studios, we run a growing online store selling pole dance equipment, apparel and accessories to customers across Australia and internationally.



We also work with a remote team based in the Philippines who play an important role in our operations, marketing and customer experience.



We are now looking for an experienced Shopify Marketing & E-commerce Coordinator to help manage and grow our online store.



This role is ideal for someone who understands how to run promotions, manage product launches, grow
 marketing and build an engaged social media presence while keeping the Shopify store organised and performing well.



You will work closely with our marketing and leadership team to execute campaigns, manage the store, coordinate with suppliers and help drive online sales.



Key Responsibilities



Shopify Store Management

Manage and maintain our Shopify store including product listings, product descriptions, pricing, images and collections.

Ensure all product information is accurate and presented in a way that maximises conversions and customer experience.

Organise products, collections and promotions inside Shopify to support marketing campaigns and seasonal offers.



 Marketing & Promotions

Plan and execute
 marketing campaigns using platforms such as Klaviyo or similar tools.

Create promotional campaigns around product launches, seasonal sales and special offers.

Segment audiences and track performance to continually improve open rates, engagement and sales conversions.



Social Media Management

Manage and grow our Instagram presence for the online store.

Plan and schedule posts that promote products, highlight customers and showcase the pole fitness lifestyle.

Coordinate social media promotions, product highlights and campaign launches.



Product & Supplier Coordination

Communicate with suppliers regarding product availability, inventory updates and new product opportunities.

Coordinate product launches including uploading products, preparing marketing assets and supporting promotional campaigns.

Ensure the store is always well stocked and up to date with the latest products.



Performance Tracking

Monitor store performance using Shopify analytics and marketing tools.

Track sales, campaign performance and customer behaviour to identify opportunities to increase conversions.

Provide regular insights and suggestions to improve promotions and marketing strategies.



Requirements

Proven experience managing or working with Shopify stores from a marketing and promotions perspective

Experience running
 marketing campaigns and promotional sales

Strong understanding of Instagram marketing and social media content for e-commerce

Experience uploading and managing products, collections and promotions inside Shopify

Strong written English and clear communication skills

Highly organised with strong attention to detail

Ability to work independently in a remote environment while collaborating with the team

Experience working with suppliers or managing product inventory is highly regarded

Bonus if you have experience with pole fitness, dance, fitness brands or lifestyle brands



Why Join Our Team

You will be working with a passionate and growing brand that is changing lives through pole fitness.

Our team values creativity, independence and people who take initiative.

This is an opportunity to play an important role in growing our online store and building a brand that supports thousands of students and customers around the world.



How to Apply



Please submit:



Your resume

A short introduction about yourself

Examples of Shopify stores, campaigns or brands you have worked with (if available)



Tell us about your experience managing Shopify stores,
 marketing or online promotions, and how you could help grow our online store.

title: Part-Time Long-Form Video Editor for YouTube
description:
About the Role



We're looking for a skilled and reliable video editor to join our team on a part-time basis. You'll be editing long-form content for our YouTube channels, turning raw footage and voiceovers into polished, engaging videos.



Hours & Commitment



20–30 hours per week

Ongoing, long-term position

Flexible schedule (work on your own time, just meet deadlines)

What You'll Do



Edit long-form YouTube videos using provided scripts, footage guidance, and voiceover files

Assemble footage, add transitions, text, and effects to create a cohesive final product

Sync audio and visuals for a professional finish

Deliver edited videos on time and ready for upload

Requirements



Proven experience editing long-form video content (please include samples or portfolio)

Proficiency with CapCut (required)

Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, and what makes YouTube content engaging

Reliable internet connection and ability to download/upload large video files

Good communication skills and responsiveness

Attention to detail

Nice to Have



Experience editing for YouTube specifically

Familiarity with YouTube trends and best practices

Knowledge of other editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

How to Apply



Please send:



A brief introduction about yourself

Links to 2–3 examples of long-form videos you've edited

Your hourly rate in PHP

Your availability to start

We're excited to find someone who can grow with us. If this sounds like a good fit, we'd love to hear from you!

title: Sales and customer support
description:
Job Description



BDM Assistant / Sales Growth Support (Base + Commission)



Company: So Money Pty Ltd

Work Type: Remote (Philippines)

Contract Type: Independent Contractor

Compensation: Base Pay + Commission (Uncapped Growth Potential)



About So Money



So Money is a solution-based mortgage manager working with mortgage brokers across Australia.



We specialise in non-bank lending solutions, including:



• Self-employed home loans

• Expat and foreign resident mortgages

• Flexible lending solutions for complex scenarios



Our strong backend processing, fast turnaround times, and product expertise allow brokers to focus on growing their business while we support them with solutions and operational efficiency.



As our partner network continues to grow, we are expanding our BDM support team to help strengthen broker relationships and drive business growth.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly motivated BDM Assistant / Sales Support professional who enjoys working in a sales-driven environment and supporting business growth.



You will work closely with our Business Development Manager (BDM) to support and grow relationships with mortgage broker partners across Australia.



Your role is to help engage brokers, support deal opportunities, and assist partners in growing their submissions with So Money.



This role offers stable base pay with performance-based commissions, giving strong performers the opportunity to increase their earnings as partner business grows.



Key Responsibilities

Broker Relationship Management



Support the BDM team in managing relationships with mortgage broker partners



Maintain regular contact with partners to ensure engagement and support



Build strong relationships with brokers and understand their lending needs



Ensure partners are aware of So Money’s products, updates, and opportunities



Sales & Growth Support



Follow up with brokers regarding loan opportunities and deal progress



Encourage broker submissions by providing responsive support



Assist with basic product enquiries and information



Identify opportunities to increase partner loan activity



Work closely with the BDM to support overall sales growth



Partner Engagement & Performance



Monitor broker activity and submission trends



Follow up with inactive partners and help re-engage them



Support the BDM with partner performance tracking



Maintain accurate CRM records and communication history



Compensation



This role offers Base Pay + Commission.



Your commission opportunities are linked to:



• Partner engagement and activity

• Loan submissions generated from supported brokers

• Settled loan outcomes



High performers can significantly increase earnings as broker business grows.



Why This Role Is Attractive



? Base income plus commission incentives

? Work directly with an experienced BDM team

? Exposure to the Australian mortgage industry

? Opportunity to grow into a BDM or sales leadership role

? Long-term remote opportunity with growth potential

? Performance-based income with no strict earning cap



Requirements

Essential



Strong English communication skills



Confident speaking with business professionals



Sales-driven mindset



Highly organised and proactive



Comfortable working in a remote environment



Experience in sales, telesales, account management, or sales support



Preferred



Experience working with Australian clients



Mortgage, finance, or lending industry exposure



BDM support or account management experience



CRM experience



Who This Role Is For



Sales professionals who enjoy building relationships



Individuals who want stable income with strong commission upside



People who enjoy supporting business growth and sales teams



Candidates who want long-term career opportunities in financial services

title: Figma Website Designer Wanted - Immediate Start
description:
We are currently looking for a creative and reliable Figma Designer to join our team and assist with the design of websites and landing pages for ongoing projects.



In this role, you will be responsible for creating clean, modern Figma designs that will later be developed into fully functioning websites. Our team will provide guidelines, examples, and clear instructions, but we are looking for someone who can also bring their own creativity and design sense to each project.



Most of the websites we design are within the trades and construction industry, including businesses such as electricians, plumbers, builders, landscapers, and other similar services. Because of this, experience designing service-based business websites would be very beneficial.



We are looking for someone who can work efficiently and meet relatively quick timelines, as many of our projects move at a fast pace. There will be ongoing work available for the right person who can consistently deliver high-quality designs.



Responsibilities:



• Design website and landing page layouts in Figma

• Follow guidelines and instructions provided by our team

• Create clean, professional layouts that are conversion-focused and user-friendly

• Structure designs so they can be easily developed by our development team

• Ensure designs are organized, consistent, and visually appealing

• Deliver designs within the required project timelines



Requirements:



• Strong experience using Figma for website design

• Good understanding of modern website layout and user experience

• Ability to follow instructions while still contributing creative design ideas

• Strong attention to detail and clean design structure

• Ability to work efficiently under tight timelines

• Reliable communication and availability for ongoing work



To confirm that you have read the full job listing, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere in your application.



When applying, please include examples of Figma website designs you have created. If you have examples of trades or construction-related websites (electricians, plumbers, builders, etc.), that would be especially helpful.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable part of our team and assist with ongoing Figma design work for websites and landing pages.

title: Meta ad creative editor
description:
We are looking for a creative editor who can produce Meta ad creatives quickly, including short video ads and image ads.



This is lead generation advertising for local businesses, not e-commerce product ads.



Immediate Opportunity



We need a few creatives produced within the next 12–15 hours.

If the work is strong, this can turn into regular ongoing work.



Responsibilities

 • Edit short video ads (15–40 seconds)

 • Create image ads and simple graphics

AI Experience (Preferred)

 • AI voiceover tools

description:

About Us:



At Falcon Funded, we help traders unlock their full potential. Our mission is to empower disciplined, consistent individuals with the capital, tools, and structure they need to succeed in the financial markets. We’re not just a funding platform, we’re building a brand that inspires, educates, and visually engages a global trading community.

title: Real Estate Research & Admin Support
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant | Real Estate Lead Research & Data Management

Job Overview:

I am a real estate investor based in Miami looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join me for a 1-month trial project. You will act as my "right hand" for data organization and lead research. If you are efficient, reliable, and have a "can-do" attitude, this role has the potential to become a long-term position as my business grows.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead Research: Identify and extract property data from public county websites (e.g., Property Appraiser, Clerk of Court records) based on specific criteria I provide.



Data Organization: Maintain and clean lead lists in Google Sheets. You must be comfortable ensuring data is accurate, formatted correctly, and easy to read.



Skip Tracing: Use online tools to find contact information (phone numbers/emails) for property owners.



CRM/Database Management: Input qualified leads into our tracking system (Google Sheets) and update lead statuses daily.



Administrative Support: Help with basic tasks as needed, such as drafting simple
s or organizing digital files.



Requirements:



Tech-Savvy: You must be proficient in Google Sheets (formulas, filtering, formatting).



Attention to Detail: You catch errors that others miss. Accuracy is more important than speed.



Proactive Problem Solver: If a website is down or a data point is missing, I want you to tell me what alternative path you found, not just stop working.



Communication: Excellent written English. You will provide a short End-of-Day (EOD) report summarizing what you accomplished.



Reliability: You are available to work 20 hours per week and hit your deadlines consistently.



Project Details:



Duration: 1 month (trial period).



Compensation: $5 per hour



Work Style: Remote / Independent Contractor.



How to Apply:

Please send me a message with the following:



A brief summary of your experience with real estate research or data entry.



Your favorite movie (to ensure you read this description!).



Confirmation that you are available to start immediately for this 1-month trial.

title: Senior News & Documentary Video Editor (Full-Time Only)
description:
TWT Unleashed is the social and documentary arm of The Washington Times.



We produce serious, non?hysterical, conservative?leaning news content across TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube, and X – plus high?end documentaries and live shows.



We’re looking for a Senior Video Editor who can own the edit, not just take orders.



APPLY HERE: 



What You’ll Own

- Turn raw news, interviews, and live shows into high?retention short?form clips (Reels, TikTok, Shorts, FB Reels).

- Build story arcs from long?form interviews / commentary into multiple clips that keep people watching to the end.

- Add captions, titles, sound design, motion, and B?roll that fit a serious, credible news brand.

- Help shape formats and visual language for the show (what “our look” is on each platform).

- Give clear direction to junior editors or motion designers when needed.

- Work directly with producers to improve turnaround time, formats, and performance over time.



This is a senior seat: you’re expected to make decisions, bring ideas, and build frameworks and templates – not wait for step?by?step instructions.



Schedule & Communication (Non?Negotiable)

- Full?time, 6 days per week, aligned to U.S. news cycles.

- Fixed daily working window with overlap to U.S. daytime.



During working hours you:

- Reply within 15–30 minutes on Slack

- Proactively update: “Draft uploaded,” “Need clarification on X,” “ETA 2 hours,” etc.

- Flag issues early so producers are never surprised by delays.

***If you want strict Monday–Friday, 9–5 with no urgency and no growth, this is not the role.***



Requirements

- 3–5+ years professional editing experience, including short?form for social (TikTok, Reels, Shorts).

- Strong reel of news / commentary / documentary?style work (not just gaming or 
 edits).

- Deep sense of storytelling, pacing, and hook selection for political / current?events content.

- Expert in Premiere Pro and After Effects



Comfortable with:

- Talking?head commentary

- Live show / panel clips

- Fast?moving news and sensitive topics

- Strong written and spoken English.

- Reliable computer and fast, stable internet (large file transfers daily).



What Success Looks Like

You consistently:

- Deliver edits on or before deadline, even with breaking stories.

- Need 1–2 revision rounds max because you understand the brand and tone.

- Increase retention and watch time on key platforms.

- Communicate early if a deadline is at risk and propose solutions.

- Are trusted to set the bar for other editors.

title: VA-Marketing-Real Estate
description:
Part-Time or Full-Time | Remote | U.S. Real Estate Focus

I am seeking a detail-oriented Virtual Marketing Assistant with strong experience in AI tools (ChatGPT, Canva AI, HeyGen), Google Ads, Meta Ads, Brivity, and social media management, and Amazon print on demand product creation.. This role supports a fast growing real estate business by executing marketing tasks, optimizing digital ads, and maintaining consistent online presence across multiple platforms. The ideal candidate is self-directed, creative, collaborative, and fast with tech — someone who can take strategy and turn it into polished, on-brand deliverables without micromanagement.



Key Responsibilities

1. Real Estate Marketing Support

Create, schedule, and manage Brivity SmartPlans, drip campaigns, and automations

Maintain listing marketing tasks in Brivity and update client communications

Responsible for property marketing (listing descriptions, Canva graphics, flyers, social posts, ads, etc.)

Prepare and send weekly seller updates using templates





2. Social Media Management

Schedule, post, and monitor content across:


, Instagram, TikTok*, YouTube*, LinkedIn*, Google Business Profile, Local Services Ads

Repurpose long-form content into short-form and platform-native versions with a heavy reliance on AI

Create and schedule all social media across all platforms

Track engagement metrics and identify opportunities to boost visibility





3. Digital Advertising (Google + Meta Ads)

Set up, manage, and optimize Google Search, Display, and Performance Max campaigns

Manage Meta Ads Manager for listing ads, lead generation, and retargeting

Track KPIs, analyze performance, and report weekly on results

Ensure all ads are Fair Housing compliant and consistent with brand





4. AI-Driven Content Creation

Tools include: ChatGPT, HeyGen, Canva Magic Write, other AI tools as needed

Responsibilities:

Draft social captions, blogs,
 campaigns, newsletters

Convert blogs into video scripts for HeyGen and use AI prompts to repurpose long-form content

Create property marketing materials and social content

Maintain consistency in my voice, tone, branding, and compliance

Update and/or Build SOPs and templates for repeatable workflows





5. Video Editing & Distribution

Use HeyGen to create avatar videos for updates, listings, and educational content

Add captions, branding, and correct formatting for Reels/Shorts/TikTok

Upload videos with optimized titles, descriptions, and SEO-friendly tags

Create vertical and horizontal formats as needed





6. Administrative & Operational Support

Maintain Google Drive organization for files, photos, and marketing assets

Track tasks, deadlines, and marketing calendars

Monitor CRM activity and notify me of hot/warm leads

Help build systems, automations, and checklists for efficiency

Prepare weekly marketing reports summarizing activity and insights







Ideal Qualifications

Experience as a VA in real estate or digital marketing

Strong understanding of Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

Skilled with Brivity (or similar real estate CRM)

Advanced proficiency with ChatGPT, Canva, and HeyGen and other AI tools

Strong English communication skills

Ability to overlap at least 6-8 hours with U.S. business hours

Organized, tech-forward, and able to handle fast turnaround projects





Soft Skills

Creative yet detail-oriented

Strong problem-solving abilities with a solutions-first mindset

Collaborative, open to feedback, and able to work closely with me

Fast learner with strong tech intuition

Independent worker with excellent communication

Highly organized and reliable

Comfortable adapting to new tools and systems





Performance Expectations

Consistent multi-platform posting

High-quality marketing deliverables

Strong ad performance and decreasing cost-per-lead

Clear and proactive communication

Daily reporting on tasks and challenges

Weekly reporting on marketing with insights, not just screenshots

title: Ecommerce Operations Specialist (WooCommerce + Salesforce)
description:
We are a UK promotional merchandise company supplying branded marketing products to global brands including UPS, Bacardi, Lego and William Hill.



We are launching a new ecommerce website in April and are looking for a reliable Ecommerce Operations Specialist based in the Philippines to support the ongoing management and growth of the site.



All product data and pricing are managed in Salesforce and synchronised to WooCommerce. Your role will focus on ensuring this data appears correctly on the website and that the catalogue is organised, accurate and optimised for customers.



This is a long-term remote position with regular weekly work.



Responsibilities



• Manage the WooCommerce product catalogue and product pages

• Ensure products and data coming from Salesforce appear correctly on the website

• Check product attributes, variations and categories are structured correctly

• Manage product images, descriptions and content presentation

• Monitor product data accuracy and catalogue organisation

• Identify and maintain “best seller” product lists

• Monitor competitor websites and identify popular or trending products

• Work with suppliers to obtain product information, images and specifications

• Liaise with our Salesforce specialist regarding product data and system workflows

• Liaise with our SEO specialist to implement internal linking and product page improvements

• Assist with ecommerce reporting and operational improvements

• Support the ongoing development of the new ecommerce website launching in April



Requirements



• Experience managing WooCommerce product catalogues

• Comfortable working with large product catalogues and structured product data

• Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

• Understanding of ecommerce product attributes and variations

• Ability to analyse competitor websites and product trends

• Good English communication

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely



Nice to Have



• Experience working with Salesforce or CRM systems

• Experience with product imports or API integrations

• Understanding of ecommerce SEO and internal linking

• Experience working with suppliers or product sourcing







How to Apply



Please answer the following questions in your application:



How many products have you managed in an e-commerce catalogue?



What e-commerce platforms have you worked with (WooCommerce, Shopify, Amazon, etc.)?



Have you worked with product data coming from another system,  such as a CRM or ERP?



To confirm you have read this job description, please start your application with the word CATALOGUE.

title: Pinterest Growth Manager
description:
Hey candidate, my name is Garin Flowers, and I’m so glad you’re here! A little about me - I’m a full-time content creator and TV host based in Los Angeles, California. I run a fast-growing fragrance community on social media where I review fragrances, share tips, and help people discover scents they love.



I’m looking for a Pinterest Growth Manager to help expand my fragrance content onto Pinterest and turn it into a powerful traffic and affiliate platform.



The main focus of this role will be taking my fragrance TikTok content and turning it into high-performing Pinterest pins that attract viewers searching for fragrance recommendations, fragrance reviews, and scent advice.



You will help me make magic happen! You’ll do this by managing the day-to-day operations of my Pinterest account, creating boards and pins, researching trends, and developing a strategy to grow the page and eventually make it profitable through affiliate marketing.



If you’re passionate about social media growth, understand Pinterest strategy, and enjoy working with lifestyle or fragrance content, this could be a great long-term opportunity.

_________________



!!! PLEASE STRICTLY FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS BELOW IF YOU WANT TO APPLY !!!



What I'm Looking For:



PINTEREST + SOCIAL MEDIA GROWTH



- Experience managing Pinterest accounts for creators or brands



- Understanding how to grow traffic through Pinterest SEO



- Skilled in Canva or similar tools for pin design



- Able to post consistently and manage high-volume pin schedules



- Knowledge of affiliate marketing is a huge plus



- Strong research skills for trending topics and keywords



- A creative thinker who can suggest new content ideas



- Organized, proactive, and able to communicate clearly



What I Offer:



- Part time work, 4 hours per day (M-F), $5.50 per hour



- Consistent weekly work that could turn into full time



- Opportunities for raises and additional responsibilities



- A chance to work with a creator building a strong online brand



- A fun, collaborative environment with room to grow



!!! IF YOU ARE CONFIDENT YOU CAN DO THIS JOB, FOLLOW THESE INSTRUCTIONS EXACTLY !!!



Apply to this job on OnlineJobs.ph



Send an
 to:



CC my assistant Angel: 



Subject Line:

 "I'm ready to grow your Pinterest"



In the
 include:



- Your resume



- Any Pinterest accounts you have managed



- A short explanation of how you would grow my Pinterest account



- One idea for a Pinterest board you would create for my content



Please Look at My Social Media

This will help you understand the content we will be repurposing:



 

 



What You'll Be Doing:



- Manage the day-to-day operations of my Pinterest account



- Create Pinterest boards and optimize them for growth



- Design and publish pins daily using content I've already created



- Turn my existing content (TikTok, YouTube, newsletters, etc.) into Pinterest pins



- Curate relevant content from other sources and promote using affiliate links



- Research Pinterest trends and keywords to maximize reach



- Develop a growth strategy to increase followers, traffic, and revenue



- Help turn Pinterest into a profitable platform through affiliate marketing



I look forward to meeting you!

title: Customer Service & Sales | Google Ads Experienced Required
description:

We’re a growing performance marketing agency specialising in Google Ads and Meta Ads, working with clients directly and through Fiverr. We’re hiring a Customer Success & Sales Specialist to own customer communication end-to-end: responding quickly, building trust, handling questions confidently, and converting enquiries into paying clients.
