title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 5a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Account Manager
description:
Benefits:

Work From Home

Guaranteed $500 USD per week

Additional available if you perform well

Unlimited potential through residual because you earn as long as your customers say with Fleetsmarts





What we do as a company:

We give a fuel card away for free to truckers in the US that have discounts on diesel fuel. We have add-on products that make the sale more attractive to the customer. Customers can get weekly credit lines for their fuel card if they use our factoring service, which is akin to a pay-day loan service for businesses, but we provide this service for free. We also have a service to help reduce the down payment on their insurance. We market to new trucking companies that are just starting out and all our products are designed to help them get going faster than they would be able to on their own.





What you do:

You call warm appointments for truckers who have already expressed interest

You explain how we can help them

95% of people say yes

The key is following up until they actually start using our services





We set up 4 interviews per day in between the hours of 4:00 and 6:00pm

We will choose one new Cat 3 Re-Engager per week.

After one week, if they don’t hit 60% patch rate, they are out.

For 5 weeks, if they hit high patch rate, we rotate them between Hannah and Cat 1s

We promote one each week to Cat 3 leads and replace our worst AM.





Key Responsibilities:

Proactively follow up on abandoned or inactive leads assigned to account managers.

Present and promote fuel card programs, factoring services, and insurance solutions to potential clients.

Assist customers with the activation of fuel cards and ensure a preferred payment method is added.

Offer factoring services and guide customers through the contract signing process to ensure completion and compliance



Qualifications:

Proven experience in sales, customer retention, or outbound calling (required)

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Confident handling high-volume outbound calls

Goal-oriented, persistent, and able to work independently

Organized and comfortable using CRM tools and office software

Positive attitude and ability to build rapport quickly

title: Sales & Marketing Rockstar – Join a Global Hospitality Brand (Full-Time)
description:
We are not just looking for a Virtual Assistant to fill a job. This position is a stepping stone to joining a cutting-edge tourist accommodation company.



Residentas is an international hospitality company operating premium properties in Lisbon, Portugal, and the United States. We are building one of the most respected brands in the short-term rental industry and are expanding our international team. We are now looking for a Sales & Marketing Virtual Assistant to support our Sales & Growth Manager.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys research, analytics, marketing, and problem-solving. You will receive clear processes and structured training, and there will be opportunities to grow within the company. We are looking for someone interested in a stable, long-term position rather than freelance work with multiple clients.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:



+ Market research and competitor analysis to keep us ahead of the curve.

+ Creating and maintaining detailed reports in spreadsheets.

+ Supporting high-impact marketing campaigns.

+ OTA listing optimization (Airbnb, Booking, etc.) to maximize visibility.

+ Researching innovative upsell opportunities (early check-in, late check-out, special packages).

+ Revenue and performance reporting to track our global growth.

+ Data entry and internal documentation.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR: 



+ Excellent Communication: Both English written and verbal skills are key to keeping our communication clear and effective. Strong spoken English and grammar are essential for this position, as we can train you in everything else.

+ Tech-Savvy: Proficiency in tools like Microsoft Office, ChatGPT, project management tools, and other digital platforms.

+ Proactive & Detail-Oriented: You anticipate needs and keep things running smoothly before issues even arise.

+ Autonomy: Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks effectively.

+ Collaborative Spirit: A friendly attitude and a readiness to work closely as part of a small team.



QUALITIES NEEDED TO BE SUCCESSFUL:



+ Skills can be learned and perfected over time. There are three qualities that we are looking for:

+ Integrity: You are a good fit if you can be honest with your fellow tea
mbers. Open communication and honesty are paramount to the team and me. If you can't meet a deadline or make a mistake, be upfront; we are all human.

+ Commitment: We are looking for someone seeking a long-term relationship, with the expectation that this will become full-time. If you want just a few months of work, this is not for you.

+ Desire to Learn: We are growing fast. We want people open to learning new skills and taking on new projects. If you're not excited about improving your skills and trying other tasks you have never done, this is not for you.



WHAT YOU GET:



+ Competitive Pay: Starting at 30,000 PHP per month, with room for growth based on performance and commitment.

+ Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection and your own home office setup.

+ Direct Impact: Play a vital role in our day-to-day sales, marketing, and strategic projects.

+ Growth Opportunities: Gain exposure to high-level decision-making and a chance to grow alongside us.



HOW TO APPLY:



I will personally read every application to find the right fit for our team. To move forward, please follow these exact steps:

+ Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs.

+ In the subject line of your message, include the code SG260303 at the end.

+ Once I receive your message with the correct subject, I will send you the link to our official application form.

+ When you fill out that form, remember to include the word SG260303 at the start of your answer to the last question so I know you’ve been paying attention to every detail.



I look forward to hearing from you!



Henrique

title: IT Help Desk Support
description:
Help Desk Support Specialist (Remote, Full-Time)



We’re a fast-moving, tech-forward team looking for a highly skilled IT pro.

We’re searching for a Help Desk Support Specialist with serious technical chops — someone who thrives in dynamic environments, loves solving complex problems, and brings both depth and curiosity to their work. This isn’t a basic ticket-taker role. You’ll be the person our team relies on to diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve issues across modern cloud platforms, networks, and devices.

If you’re energized by autonomy, ownership, and the chance to make a real impact, you’ll fit right in.



Who We Are

We’re a lean, ambitious, and tech-driven team that operates with startup speed and zero bureaucracy. We move fast, collaborate openly, and constantly push to improve our systems and ourselves. Everyone here has a voice, and everyone’s ideas matter.



Our Culture



Built for Builders

We love people who go deep — the ones who can’t resist digging into logs, optimizing workflows, or reverse-engineering a weird issue until it finally clicks. If you’re wired to figure things out, you’ll thrive here.



Remote-First, Trust-Driven

We don’t micromanage. We give you ownership, flexibility, and the freedom to do your best work. What matters is impact, not hours.



Collaboration Without the Corporate Fluff

We communicate openly, help each other out, and jump in wherever needed. No politics, no silos, no “that’s not my job.”



Always Improving

We’re constantly refining our processes, tools, and documentation. If you see a better way to do something, we want you to run with it.



Tech-Forward Mindset

We’re not just support — we’re problem-solvers, system thinkers, and technical strategists. Curiosity and experimentation are part of the job.



Human-Centered Support

Even with all the tech, we never forget the human side. We treat every user with patience, clarity, and respect.



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To be considered, you must submit the following through the job platform’s messaging system:

•  A link to a short introductory video explaining why you're a strong candidate

•  Your resume

•  Your profile link on this job platform

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Key Responsibilities

•  Provide expert-level support via phone, chat, and

•  Diagnose and resolve complex hardware, software, and network issues

•  Support and troubleshoot Microsoft 365, including:

•  Outlook (profiles, mail flow, advanced configuration)

•  Teams (permissions, meetings, call quality, device integration)

•  SharePoint (permissions, file sync, site access)

•  Manage user accounts, authentication, and permissions

•  Maintain detailed documentation and update support tickets

•  Collaborate on internal IT projects and system improvements

•  Meet and exceed performance metrics such as response time, resolution rate, and customer satisfaction



Required Qualifications

•  5+ years of hands-on technical support experience

•  Strong troubleshooting skills across hardware, software, networking, and cloud platforms

•  Advanced proficiency with Microsoft 365, including Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, and admin functions

•  Experience with remote desktop tools and enterprise ticketing systems

•  Strong understanding of Windows, macOS, and mobile OS environments

•  Solid grasp of networking fundamentals (DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewalls, Wi?Fi)

•  Knowledge of cybersecurity best practices

•  Experience supporting VOIP phone systems

•  Working knowledge of office printers

•  Excellent English communication skills

•  Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities



Preferred technical experience:

•  Unifi

•  Microsoft 365 administration 
, apps, SharePoint, Teams policies)



Work-From-Home Requirements

•  Quiet, dedicated workspace

•  Reliable computer with up-to-date hardware and dual monitors

•  High-speed internet (50 Mbps minimum recommended)

•  Noise-canceling headset, microphone, and smartphone connected to WiFi

•  Webcam for meetings and ticket reviews

•  Familiarity with VPNs and secure authentication methods



Bonus Points

•  Certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft

•  Experience supporting cloud platforms (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace)

•  Multilingual support

•  Ability to work flexible shifts or participate in on-call rotations



Ready to Apply?

If you’re a technically strong IT professional who thrives in a fast-moving, startup-style environment, submit your application with all required materials listed above. We can’t wait to meet you.

title: Executive admin assistant
description:
WE’RE HIRING: Student Success Manager / WhatsApp Operations VA (Philippines — Long-Term)

Remote | UK Education (GCSE & A-Level) | Immediate Start



We’re a premium UK tutoring company (20+ years in education) scaling rapidly. Our operations run primarily through WhatsApp and we need a high-calibre Virtual Assistant / Student Success Manager to manage daily communications, onboarding, and tutor–student coordination — with a clear growth path into Setter ? Closer (high-ticket sales).



Role Summary



You will be the front-line operations backbone of the business:

• monitoring WhatsApp continuously during shift hours

• onboarding new students smoothly

• creating WhatsApp groups + sending structured messages

• matching students to tutors and ensuring lessons run without disruption

• communicating professionally with parents about day-to-day learning, homework, and lesson logistics



This role is ideal for someone who is organised, calm under pressure, confident communicating with parents, and willing to learn our systems quickly.



Core Responsibilities

1) WhatsApp Monitoring & Student Onboarding (Daily)



Monitor multiple WhatsApp inboxes during your shift (fast response times expected)



Save new leads/students as contacts correctly (naming conventions provided)



Create WhatsApp groups for new students (e.g., Student + Parent + Tutor + Admin)



Send structured onboarding messages (templates provided)



Follow up systematically (no missed conversations)



Track inflow of students/leads and ensure every enquiry progresses to the next step



2) Tutor–Student Matching & Lesson Coordination (Daily)



Pair students with the right tutor (based on subject, year group, exam board, availability)



Ensure everyone has the correct Zoom/lesson link and lesson timings



Confirm attendance and handle reschedules smoothly



Keep a daily log of lessons booked, completed, missed, and rescheduled



Escalate urgent issues to the director/operations lead quickly and clearly



3) Parent Communication & Student Success Support



Communicate with parents professionally about:



homework submission



missed lessons



exam timelines



progress updates (based on tutor feedback)



Remind students to complete homework / assessments



Occasionally join/check Zoom sessions briefly (when required) to ensure students are engaged and following the process



Support quality assurance standards (consistent messaging, accurate info, calm tone)



4) Optional Growth Duties (As You Prove Yourself)



Appointment setting (booking parent calls)



Sales support (follow-up sequences, warm leads)



Setter role ? Closer role (high-ticket sales) with performance-based earning potential



Light admin support on Zoom logins / scheduling systems (introduced later)



Required Skills & Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Excellent English communication (written + spoken)



Clear, neutral/British-sounding spoken English (parents must find your speech easy to understand)



Confident speaking to UK parents (polite, calm, professional)



Strong organisation: ability to track multiple students/tutors without errors



Comfortable working in a fast-moving WhatsApp-based operations environment



Familiarity with UK education is a major advantage:



GCSE / IGCSE / A-Level awareness (exam boards, grade goals, terminology)



Willingness to learn systems and follow structured processes



Tech Setup Required



Desktop/laptop with WhatsApp Web/Desktop running during shift



Smartphone with WhatsApp installed (for mobility/backup monitoring)



Stable high-speed internet + quiet, professional workspace



Strong typing speed + ability to manage multiple chats efficiently



Basic familiarity with Google Sheets/Docs for logging and tracking



Working Hours



UK business-hours coverage preferred (approx. 9am–5pm UK time), 8-hour shifts



Additional light monitoring may be required occasionally (to be agreed in advance)



Compensation & Growth Path



Fixed salary initially (based on experience and performance in trial period)



Clear progression route:



Student Success Manager / Ops VA



Setter (appointment booking + lead handling)



Closer (high-ticket enrolments) ? higher earning potential



The more responsibility you can handle reliably, the faster your pay and role can grow



What “Good” Looks Like in This Role



No missed leads, no missed follow-ups



Groups set up correctly, messages sent cleanly, parents feel supported



Tutor–student pairing is smooth and errors are rare



You sound confident, warm, professional — parents trust you



You protect the learning experience through consistent communication and structure



How to Apply (MANDATORY)



To be considered, you must send:



CV/Resume (not necessary)



A YouTube video link (not a file upload) — 2 to 4 minutes, unlisted is fine (MUST)

or another suitable link.



Your YouTube video must cover:



Who you are and your relevant experience (especially education/parent-facing work)



Why you’re a strong fit for a premium tutoring company



A short roleplay: how you would speak to a parent about homework not being submitted



Your availability and tech setup (desktop + phone WhatsApp)



Applications without a YouTube link will be rejected.



Important



DO NOT CALL — applications via message only



This role requires professionalism, speed, and reliability



If you’re organised, presentable, parent-friendly, and serious about building a long-term career in education operations — apply now.

title: AI Video Creator — Cleaning Product B-Roll
description:
I run a growing cleaning product brand on TikTok Shop and I need someone to create AI-generated B-roll video clips on an ongoing basis. This is not a one-off project — this is long-term, consistent work for someone who is reliable and detail-oriented.



You will be creating short, realistic-looking video clips of cleaning products being used in kitchens — spraying grease, wiping surfaces clean, before-and-after reveals. The videos are generated using AI tools (Google VEO 3 and NanoBananaPro). No filming required. Everything is done from your computer.



I provide the full workflow, all prompts, start frame images, and reference videos. You follow the steps, generate the clips, and deliver. If you can follow instructions carefully and have a good eye for quality, this is for you.



The more videos you produce, the more you earn. Top performers will get more volume and higher rates over time.



What You Need

    • A computer with reliable internet

    • Willingness to learn AI video generation tools (VEO 3, NanoBananaPro)

    • Strong attention to detail — small things matter in this work

    • Ability to follow a step-by-step workflow precisely

    • Problem-solving mindset — AI doesn’t always work on the first try, you need to adjust and figure it out



What I Provide

    • Complete step-by-step workflow with exact prompts

    • Start frame images for every video

    • Reference videos so you know exactly what the final result should look like

    • AI tool access once you are hired



Pay

Pay is per video. This is ongoing, part-time work with consistent volume. The more reliable you are, the more work you get. Payment once per month via PayPal.



How to Apply

This is not a normal application. Instead of sending me a resume, you will complete a short trial task.

I have prepared a document with the full workflow, prompts, and instructions. Your job is to follow the steps and create the video clips described. Everything you need is in the document.



Trial task document:





Read the document carefully, create the clips, upload them to a Google Drive folder, and submit the link.



Do NOT send me a generic cover letter or resume. I will only review completed trial tasks.



I will review all submissions and contact the candidates whose work meets the standard. If you put in the effort and your clips look good, you will be hired.

title: Research & Outreach Virtual Assistant (Business Consulting Firm)
description:
We are a small but growing U.S. consulting firm that helps businesses improve their customer experience and customer retention.



We are looking for a smart, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who enjoys research and identifying business opportunities.



Your main role will be helping our consultants identify companies that may benefit from a Customer Experience Diagnostic Session.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys research, organization, and learning about how businesses grow.



Responsibilities



• Research companies in target industries

• Identify potential customer experience issues using public information

• Document company insights in a spreadsheet

• Find relevant decision makers (CEO, COO, Head of Customer Experience)

• Assist with outreach preparation

• Track outreach progress and responses

• Help maintain our CRM and research database



Tools We Use



• Google Workspace

• Squarespace

• Stripe

• LinkedIn

• Online research tools



Ideal Candidate



• Strong English written communication

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable researching companies online

• Interested in business strategy or consulting

• Able to work independently



Growth Opportunity



As the company grows, this role may expand into:



• operations support

• marketing coordination

• project management support



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long term.



To confirm you read this job post, please include the word “Journey” in the first sentence of your application.
